title: Control of turn-to-turn contact resistivity in resistively insulated REBCO coils
summary: Resistively insulated (RI) REBCO magnets feature short ramp times and low ramp losses while maintaining the advantages of no-insulation coils with high engineering current density and tolerance for defects in the REBCO conductor. Control of the turn-to-turn contact resistivity Rc is key to RI technology. Rc must be sufficiently high to prevent a large transient current, which could result in high mechanical stress during magnet quenches. Meanwhile it must be lower than the quench propagation limit to avoid conductor burn-out during a quench. Therefore, it is critical to control Rc within a suitable range of values which is usually coil specific. Previously, we discovered that Rc between two REBCO tapes with a stainless steel interlayer decreases dramatically with contact pressure cycling by up to three orders of magnitude. This drastic change made it impossible to design a suitable Rc value for a stainless steel co-wound RI magnet. In this work, we first present methods for mitigating Rc pressure cycling sensitivity. We found that by adding conductive fillers, such as conductive paste or epoxy, the Rc load cycling sensitivity is largely mitigated. For dry-wound coils, Rc load cycling sensitivity is mitigated by coating REBCO tape with a layer of 2- 3 um of PbSn solder. In addition, Rc can be controlled by oxidizing the stainless steel co-wind tape by heating stainless steel tapes at different temperatures in air. Using above methods, short sample tests showed that Rc was controlled to prescribed values of 1000 and 5000 uOhm-cm2 and was not sensitive to contact pressure cycling up to 30,000 cycles at 4.2 K. The new Rc control method was applied to a 6 double-pancake test coil which was tested at 4.2 K. The Rc in this test coil was comparable with the short sample results. This demonstrated the ability of this new method to control Rc in large coils.

AI.tldr: 提出控制电阻绝缘REBCO磁体匝间接触电阻Rc的新方法，通过添加导电填料、PbSn焊料涂层或氧化不锈钢带，成功缓解Rc对压力循环的敏感性，实现Rc的精确控制
AI.motivation: 电阻绝缘REBCO磁体需要控制匝间接触电阻Rc在合适范围内：既要足够高以防止瞬态电流过大导致机械应力，又要足够低以避免失超时导体烧毁。先前发现不锈钢夹层REBCO带材的Rc会随压力循环急剧下降，无法设计合适的Rc值
AI.method: 1) 添加导电填料（导电浆料或环氧树脂）缓解Rc压力循环敏感性；2) 干绕线圈中，在REBCO带上涂覆2-3μm PbSn焊料层；3) 通过空气中加热不锈钢带控制氧化程度来调节Rc。通过短样测试验证方法有效性
AI.result: 短样测试显示Rc可控制在预定值（1000和5000 μΩ·cm²），且在4.2K下对高达30,000次压力循环不敏感。6双饼测试线圈的Rc与短样结果相当，证明新方法在大线圈中的适用性
AI.conclusion: 成功开发出控制电阻绝缘REBCO磁体匝间接触电阻Rc的新方法，有效缓解了Rc对压力循环的敏感性，实现了Rc的精确控制和稳定性，为大型线圈设计提供了可靠解决方案

title: Singlet-only always-on gapless exchange (SAGE) spin qubits: Charge noise effects and two-qubit gates
summary: Singlet-only always-on gapless exchange (SAGE) spin qubits are an alternative type of exchange-only (EO) qubits that encode a single qubit in the spins of four electrons located in four tunnel-coupled quantum dots. While conventional EO qubits are susceptible to local magnetic field gradients caused by local nuclear environments and $g$-factor variations, the SAGE qubit subspace is inherently protected from magnetic-gradient-induced Pauli errors by virtue of the singlet-only encoding, which is invariant under magnetic field gradients, and the always-on exchange couplings, which provide energetic leakage protection. However, the always-on operation simultaneously increases the qubit's sensitivity to charge noise. Here, starting from a Hubbard model describing the underlying electronic structure of the coupled quantum dots, we characterize the performance of SAGE qubits in the presence of $1/f$ charge noise that induces fluctuations in both the dot chemical potentials and the interdot tunnel couplings. We calculate SAGE idle coherence times and show that realistic CPMG-like pulse sequences can be used to significantly extend SAGE single-qubit coherence times for experimentally relevant charge noise strengths. We likewise study the fidelity of SAGE two-qubit gates in the presence of charge and magnetic noise and again propose a simple refocusing strategy to mitigate the noise, while increased ramp times of the entangling pulse suppress leakage into noncomputational states.

AI.tldr: SAGE spin qubits使用四电子单重态编码，对磁场梯度有天然保护，但始终开启的交换耦合使其对电荷噪声敏感。本文分析了1/f电荷噪声下的性能，提出了CPMG脉冲序列和重聚焦策略来提升相干时间和门保真度。
AI.motivation: 传统交换型量子比特易受局部磁场梯度影响，而SAGE量子比特通过单重态编码和始终开启的交换耦合提供了对磁场梯度的固有保护。然而，这种始终开启的操作增加了对电荷噪声的敏感性，需要研究如何在实际噪声环境下优化其性能。
AI.method: 从描述耦合量子点电子结构的Hubbard模型出发，分析SAGE量子比特在1/f电荷噪声下的性能。计算空闲相干时间，研究CPMG脉冲序列对相干时间的提升效果。同时分析电荷和磁噪声下的双量子比特门保真度，提出重聚焦策略和缓慢脉冲斜坡来抑制噪声和泄漏。
AI.result: 对于实验相关的电荷噪声强度，CPMG脉冲序列能显著延长SAGE单量子比特相干时间。提出的简单重聚焦策略能有效缓解噪声影响，而增加纠缠脉冲的斜坡时间可以抑制向非计算态的泄漏。
AI.conclusion: SAGE量子比特虽然对电荷噪声敏感，但通过适当的脉冲序列设计和噪声缓解策略，可以在实际噪声环境下实现良好的相干时间和门保真度，为磁场梯度敏感环境中的量子计算提供了有前景的解决方案。

title: Charge Density Wave Driven Topological Phase Transition in Vortices
summary: The interplay between charge density waves (CDWs) and superconductivity is a central theme in quantum materials, yet how CDW phase textures govern vortex topology remains poorly understood. We develop a theoretical framework showing that the phase of a stripe CDW can switch a magnetic vortex between topological and trivial regimes. Motivated by recent experiments, we propose two candidate mechanisms enabling phase-controlled switching of vortex topology. In a direct-modulation scenario, the CDW acts as a periodic potential that locally renormalizes band parameters and can induce topological transitions, but it generally cannot reproduce the symmetric node/antinode trend without fine tuning. In contrast, in an inversion-symmetry-breaking (ISB) scenario, a CDW node pinned to the vortex center breaks local inversion and allows for the mixture of spin-triplet pairing of Cooper pairs, producing a robust topological transition when this component dominates. Our results suggests CDW phase as a possible local handle to tune and test vortex topology.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出理论框架，证明条纹电荷密度波（CDW）的相位可以调控磁涡旋的拓扑性质，在拓扑与非拓扑态之间切换。
AI.motivation: 电荷密度波与超导性的相互作用是量子材料研究的核心问题，但CDW相位纹理如何调控涡旋拓扑性质尚不清楚。受近期实验启发，需要理论框架解释CDW相位对涡旋拓扑的调控机制。
AI.method: 提出两种候选机制：直接调制场景中，CDW作为周期性势能局部重整化能带参数；反转对称性破缺场景中，CDW节点固定在涡旋中心破坏局部反转对称性，允许自旋三重态配对混合。
AI.result: 直接调制机制通常无法复现对称节点/反节点趋势，需要精细调节；而反转对称性破缺机制能产生鲁棒的拓扑转变，当自旋三重态配对成分占主导时尤为有效。
AI.conclusion: CDW相位可作为局部调控涡旋拓扑性质的有效手段，为实验调控和测试涡旋拓扑提供了新途径。

title: Simulating altermagnets using mumax+
summary: In this paper, we demonstrate how altermagnets can be simulated in the recently released micromagnetic simulation package mumax+. We have added a new magnet class for d-wave altermagnets and demonstrate how mumax+ is able to reproduce the analytical solutions for line profiles of the Néel vector and net magnetization for a Bloch domain wall. Next, we show simulation results of the magnon dispersion relation and its dependence on the anisotropic nature of the exchange interaction. Finally, we study the motion of a Néel skyrmion by applying a spin transfer torque. This new feature was implemented by extending the pre-existing code base for antiferromagnetic simulations. The object-oriented design of mumax+ allows for a correct calculation of the magnetostatic field in multi-sublattice systems, a feature that many other micromagnetic simulators lack.

AI.tldr: 在mumax+微磁模拟软件中实现了交变磁体模拟功能，包括d波交变磁体类、布洛赫畴壁分析解验证、磁振子色散关系模拟和奈尔斯格米子运动研究。
AI.motivation: 现有微磁模拟软件缺乏对交变磁体的支持，特别是多亚晶格系统中磁静场的正确计算。mumax+的面向对象设计使其能够准确处理这类复杂系统。
AI.method: 在mumax+中添加新的d波交变磁体磁体类，扩展反铁磁模拟代码库。通过模拟验证布洛赫畴壁的解析解，研究各向异性交换作用对磁振子色散关系的影响，并应用自旋转移矩研究奈尔斯格米子运动。
AI.result: 成功在mumax+中实现了交变磁体模拟功能，能够准确再现布洛赫畴壁的解析解，展示了磁振子色散关系对交换作用各向异性的依赖性，并模拟了自旋转移矩驱动的奈尔斯格米子运动。
AI.conclusion: mumax+成功扩展了交变磁体模拟能力，其面向对象设计能够正确处理多亚晶格系统的磁静场计算，为交变磁体研究提供了强大的模拟工具，填补了现有微磁模拟软件的空白。

title: Ultrastrong Coupling Signatures in Photon Statistics from Terahertz Higgs-Polaritons
summary: The ultrastrong coupling regime of cavity photons and quantum materials has emerged as a pathway to modify materials properties, however definitive signatures of ultrastrong coupling remain elusive. Focusing on the quantum photon statistics of light transmitted through a cavity-embedded superconductor, we show that a two-photon Higgs polariton at strong coupling realizes a photonic nonlinearity at the single terahertz photon level. We find that as light-matter coupling increases, the photon statistics show pronounced changes due to the formation of a hybrid photon-matter dark-cavity state with finite photon occupancy, producing testable signatures of ultrastrong coupling. We derive a non-Markovian input output relation and study the cavity-embedded superconductor 2H-NbSe2 as it approaches ultrastrong light-matter coupling. Our results reveal a diagnostic for ultrastrong coupling in the two-photon coincidence statistics that is absent in total counts.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过分析腔嵌入超导体中透射光的量子光子统计，揭示了超强耦合的独特特征，特别是双光子Higgs极化激元在单太赫兹光子水平实现光子非线性，为超强耦合提供了可测试的诊断方法。
AI.motivation: 超强耦合机制在腔光子与量子材料中展现出改变材料性质的潜力，但明确的超强耦合特征仍然难以捉摸。需要寻找可靠的诊断方法来确认超强耦合状态。
AI.method: 研究聚焦于腔嵌入超导体中透射光的量子光子统计，推导了非马尔可夫输入输出关系，并以2H-NbSe2超导体为例，研究其接近超强光-物质耦合时的行为。通过分析双光子符合统计来识别超强耦合特征。
AI.result: 发现随着光-物质耦合增强，光子统计显示出显著变化，这是由于形成了具有有限光子占据的混合光子-物质暗腔态。双光子Higgs极化激元在强耦合下实现了单太赫兹光子水平的光子非线性。双光子符合统计中出现了在总计数中不存在的超强耦合诊断特征。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了双光子符合统计作为超强耦合的诊断工具的重要性，为识别和验证超强耦合状态提供了新的实验方法，特别是在腔嵌入超导体系统中。

title: Growth of quantum dots by droplet etching epitaxy in molecular beam epitaxy: theory, practice, and review
summary: GaAs quantum dots grown by droplet etching epitaxy are high-quality solid-state sources of quantum light. Despite implementation in devices that exploit quantum phenomenon, a comprehensive review on the crystal growth of quantum dots grown by droplet etching epitaxy is absent, unlike for other quantum dot growth techniques such as the related droplet epitaxy method or Stranski-Krastanov growth of InAs quantum dots. This review presents a detailed overview of the droplet etching epitaxy growth technique in the molecular beam epitaxy environment, with emphasis on the growth parameters necessary to realize high-quality quantum dots. We systematically cover the three main phases of droplet etching epitaxy - droplet deposition, droplet etching, and nanohole regrowth - and relate experimental results to theories on crystal growth. The review concludes with an introduction to GaAs quantum dot photoluminescence and the extension of droplet etching epitaxy beyond the AlGaAs/GaAs material system.

AI.tldr: 本文是关于液滴刻蚀外延生长GaAs量子点的综述，系统介绍了该生长技术及其在量子光源中的应用。
AI.motivation: 尽管液滴刻蚀外延生长的GaAs量子点是高质量的固态量子光源，但与其他量子点生长技术（如相关液滴外延或InAs量子点的Stranski-Krastanov生长）不同，目前缺乏对该生长技术的全面综述。
AI.method: 在分子束外延环境中详细综述液滴刻蚀外延生长技术，重点关注实现高质量量子点所需的生长参数。系统覆盖液滴刻蚀外延的三个主要阶段：液滴沉积、液滴刻蚀和纳米孔再生长，并将实验结果与晶体生长理论联系起来。
AI.result: 提供了液滴刻蚀外延生长技术的全面概述，包括生长参数优化、实验与理论结合的分析，以及该技术在GaAs量子点光致发光和扩展到AlGaAs/GaAs材料系统之外的应用。
AI.conclusion: 本文填补了液滴刻蚀外延生长技术综述的空白，为高质量GaAs量子点的生长提供了系统指导，并展示了该技术在量子光源领域的应用前景和扩展潜力。

title: A Structure-Preserving Graph Neural Solver for Parametric Hyperbolic Conservation Laws
summary:
Hyperbolic conservation laws govern a wide range of transport-driven dynamics featuring shocks, contact discontinuities, and complex wave interactions, posing distinct challenges for deep-learning-based surrogate modeling. While classical numerical methods provide robust and physically admissible solutions, their computational cost restricts applicability in many-query tasks such as parametric studies and design optimization. Conversely, existing neural surrogates offer rapid inference but often fail to respect intrinsic PDE structures, leading to non-physical artifacts, rollout instability, and poor generalization.
  We present an interpretable, structure-preserving graph neural solver that bridges classical numerical principles with graph neural networks (GNNs). The network is designed as a learned reconstruction-and-flux operator rather than a black-box state updater, thereby inherently preserving key properties such as local conservation and upwinding. Inspired by Arbitrary high-order DERivatives schemes, we further recast message-passing GNNs as high-order space-time predictors, enabling conservative and stable neural updates with large time steps.
  Evaluation is performed on challenging supersonic flow benchmarks spanning broad parametric variations in geometry, initial/boundary conditions, and flow regimes. The neural solver achieves superior long-horizon rollout stability and accuracy compared with strong surrogate baselines, outperforms low-order discretizations, and delivers orders-of-magnitude runtime speedups over high-resolution simulations.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于图神经网络的守恒律求解器，将经典数值方法与神经网络结合，实现结构保持的快速计算
AI.motivation: 双曲守恒律方程在计算流体力学中广泛存在，但传统数值方法计算成本高，而现有神经网络代理模型无法保持物理结构，导致非物理伪影和稳定性问题
AI.method: 设计可解释的图神经网络求解器，作为学习型重构-通量算子而非黑盒状态更新器，基于ADER方案将消息传递GNN重构为高阶时空预测器
AI.result: 在超音速流动基准测试中，神经求解器在长时程稳定性、准确性方面优于现有代理模型，超越低阶离散化方法，相比高分辨率模拟实现数量级加速
AI.conclusion: 该工作成功将经典数值原理与图神经网络结合，开发出结构保持的神经求解器，为守恒律方程的快速计算提供了新途径

title: Laser induced surface nitriding of niobium: phase evolution and superconducting behaviour
summary: Laser nitriding represents a versatile approach for tailoring the surface properties of metals. Up to now, its effect on the superconducting response of niobium nitrides remains largely unexplored. In this work, the nitriding process of niobium by laser irradiation under a controlled nitrogen atmosphere up to 2.50 bar, using a nanosecond pulsed laser with wavelength of 1064 nm has been investigated. By independently tuning the nitrogen pressure, the two-dimensional accumulated fluence ($F_{2D}$) and the laser irradiance, a laser-processing map for the formation of either a combination of $β$-Nb$_2$N (hexagonal) and $γ$-Nb$_4$N$_{3\pm x}$ (tetragonal) phases or only the $β$-phase has been established. Systematic analysis by X-ray diffraction, scanning electron microscopy and electron backscatter diffraction revealed that the nitrogen-rich $γ$-phase forms in the near-surface layer through melting when $F_{2D}$ exceeds a certain value ($> 50 \,\mathrm{kJ/cm^2}$ at 2.50 bar). A $β$-layer is observed underneath, and further inside, there is a band of embedded $β$-grains in the Nb matrix. Their size gradually decreases with increasing distance to surface, suggesting thermal gradients and a diffusion formation mechanism. When the $γ$-phase becomes predominant, a significant increase in the superconducting critical temperature is observed, up to $T_c \approx 15\,\mathrm{K}$, and magnetic irreversibility. For low $F_{2D}$ values ($\approx 7.5 \,\mathrm{kJ/cm^2}$ at 1.50-2.50 bar), the formation of a uniform nitride layer composed of sub-micron-sized $β$-Nb$_2$N grains results in a ca. fourfold enhancement in surface microhardness. These findings provide fundamental insights into laser-induced nitriding of niobium to engineer mechanically robust and superconducting Nb-N layers.

AI.tldr: 激光氮化铌可调控表面性能，形成不同氮化物相，影响超导特性和机械硬度
AI.motivation: 激光氮化对铌氮化物超导响应的影响尚未充分研究，需要探索激光参数对氮化相形成和性能的影响
AI.method: 在受控氮气环境下（最高2.50 bar）使用1064 nm纳秒脉冲激光对铌进行氮化，通过独立调节氮气压力、二维累积通量和激光辐照度建立激光加工图，采用XRD、SEM和EBSD进行系统分析
AI.result: 建立了形成β-Nb₂N和γ-Nb₄N₃±ₓ混合相或纯β相的激光加工图；当F₂D > 50 kJ/cm²时，近表面层形成富氮γ相；γ相主导时超导临界温度显著提高至Tc≈15K；低F₂D时形成均匀β-Nb₂N亚微米晶粒层，表面显微硬度提高约4倍
AI.conclusion: 激光诱导铌氮化可工程化制备机械坚固且具有超导性能的Nb-N层，为表面性能调控提供了基础见解

title: Current-Induced Dynamics and Instability Pathways of Skyrmioniums in Chiral Magnets
summary: We present a comprehensive study of current-driven dynamics, transformations, and instabilities of skyrmioniums in chiral magnetic films, considering both isolated objects and collective states forming skyrmionium-based meta-matter. Using micromagnetic simulations combined with an analytical description based on the generalized Thiele equation, we clarify how the internal structure of skyrmioniums governs their nonequilibrium response to electric currents. Despite having zero total topological charge, skyrmioniums exhibit a finite transverse velocity under applied currents. We show that this skyrmionium Hall effect originates from an imbalance between positive and negative topological contributions of the inner skyrmion and surrounding ring, which typically occupy different areas. Current-induced deformations further enhance this imbalance, yielding Hall angles comparable to those of skyrmions. At higher current densities, skyrmioniums undergo distinct instabilities depending on magnetic field and uniaxial anisotropy, including elongation, collapse into a skyrmion, transformation into a topologically trivial droplet, and expansion into stripe textures. We map these regimes in current--field and current--anisotropy phase diagrams and resolve their microscopic pathways via the evolution of topological charge and local rotational measures. Beyond isolated textures, mixed skyrmion--skyrmionium lattices display rich collective dynamics, including elastic transport, polymorphic transitions, soliton exchange, and stripe formation. Pulsed currents provide additional control, enabling access to regimes beyond continuous driving. Our results establish skyrmioniums and their meta-matter as tunable nonequilibrium systems probing the topological energy landscape far from equilibrium.

AI.tldr: 该研究系统分析了手性磁薄膜中斯格明子泡在电流驱动下的动力学行为、结构转变和不稳定性，揭示了其霍尔效应的物理机制，并探索了斯格明子泡基元物质的集体动力学特性。
AI.motivation: 研究斯格明子泡（具有零总拓扑电荷的磁性结构）在电流驱动下的非平衡响应，理解其独特的动力学行为和结构稳定性，为基于拓扑磁性结构的自旋电子学应用提供理论基础。
AI.method: 结合微磁模拟和基于广义Thiele方程的解析描述，分析孤立斯格明子泡和集体态（斯格明子-斯格明子泡混合晶格）的电流驱动动力学，研究不同磁场和单轴各向异性条件下的相变行为。
AI.result: 发现斯格明子泡虽具有零总拓扑电荷，但在电流作用下表现出有限的横向速度（斯格明子泡霍尔效应），其源于内部斯格明子和外围环的正负拓扑贡献面积不平衡。电流诱导的形变进一步增强了这种不平衡，使霍尔角与斯格明子相当。在高电流密度下，斯格明子泡会发生伸长、坍缩成斯格明子、转变为拓扑平凡液滴或扩展成条纹结构等不稳定性。混合晶格表现出丰富的集体动力学行为，包括弹性输运、多态转变、孤子交换和条纹形成。
AI.conclusion: 斯格明子泡及其元物质构成了可调控的非平衡系统，能够探测远离平衡态的拓扑能量景观，为拓扑磁性结构的动力学控制和自旋电子学应用开辟了新途径。

title: Probabilistic Upscaling of Hydrodynamics in Geological Fractures Under Uncertainty
summary:
Flow and transport in fractured geological media are strongly controlled by aperture heterogeneity and uncertainty in subsurface characterisation, yet most upscaling approaches rely on deterministic representations of fracture permeability. This study presents a scalable probabilistic workflow that bridges image-based fracture geometry and uncertainty-aware hydraulic predictions across scales. The approach integrates Bayesian correction of aperture-permeability model misspecification, a deep learning surrogate for predicting spatially distributed permeability statistics, and Darcy-scale flow upscaling to propagate uncertainty to effective transmissivity.
  The workflow is applied to natural shear fractures from core material in the Little Grand Wash Fault damage zone (Utah) and to simplified geometries derived from the same datasets. The Bayesian component quantifies uncertainty due to measurement errors and imperfect constitutive relations, while a Residual U-Net learns the effects of local heterogeneity and spatial correlation on predicted permeability uncertainty. Together, these components generate ensembles of permeability fields that are subsequently upscaled to probabilistic macroscopic flow responses.
  Results show that common empirical aperture-permeability relations are systematically biased for natural fractures, whereas the proposed probabilistic workflow yields uncertainty-aware permeability estimates consistent with physics-based behaviour. The method captures the impact of channelisation, connectivity, and complex 3D void geometries on transmissivity while quantifying the resulting uncertainty bounds. Computational efficiency arises from the proposed hybrid strategy for probabilistic upscaling, which combines physics-informed and data-driven approaches, preserves Stokes-flow consistency and supports uncertainty propagation without repeated high-fidelity simulations.

AI.tldr: 提出一个可扩展的概率工作流，结合贝叶斯校正、深度学习代理和达西尺度升尺度，用于裂缝介质的不确定性感知水力预测
AI.motivation: 裂缝地质介质中的流动和输运受孔径异质性和地下表征不确定性的强烈控制，但大多数升尺度方法依赖于裂缝渗透率的确定性表示，需要一种能够处理不确定性的概率方法
AI.method: 集成贝叶斯校正孔径-渗透率模型误设、深度学习代理预测空间分布渗透率统计、达西尺度流动升尺度传播不确定性到有效导水率的可扩展概率工作流
AI.result: 常见经验孔径-渗透率关系对天然裂缝存在系统性偏差，而提出的概率工作流产生与物理一致的不确定性感知渗透率估计，捕捉通道化、连通性和复杂3D空隙几何对导水率的影响
AI.conclusion: 提出的混合概率升尺度策略结合物理信息和数据驱动方法，保持斯托克斯流动一致性，支持不确定性传播而无需重复高保真模拟，计算高效且能量化不确定性边界

title: Linear and nonlinear vibrational excitation driven by molecular polaritons
summary: Following our recent numerical study [arXiv:2601.16299 (2026)], we investigate vibrational excitation induced by transient optical driving in molecular ensembles strongly coupled to a cavity mode using the field-driven Holstein--Tavis--Cummings model. We analyze how pulsed excitation redistributes energy among electronic, photonic, and vibrational degrees of freedom in molecular polaritons. Vibrational dynamics are examined over a broad range of pulse durations and intensities within both the single-excitation approximation and a mean-field description of collective light--matter coupling. Despite their distinct formulations and microscopic descriptions, these two approaches yield consistent scaling relations for vibrational excitation. In particular, we disentangle linear and nonlinear contributions to vibrational excitation, which are reflected in distinct quadratic and quartic scaling behaviors with respect to the driving field amplitude (that is, linear and quadratic dependence on the incident pulse intensity). The microscopic origin of the nonlinear component is identified as a polariton-mediated intrapulse stimulated Raman-like process, enabled by a pulse spectral bandwidth large enough to overlap both upper and lower polaritons (rather than a conventional multi-pulse scheme). These results establish a unified framework for understanding vibrational excitation under pulsed polariton driving and provide guidance for the interpretation and control of ultrafast polariton experiments. Discrepancies between the mean-field and single-excitation approaches under certain pulsed conditions are identified and analyzed.

AI.tldr: 该研究探讨了在强耦合腔中分子极化激元在脉冲光驱动下的振动激发机制，揭示了振动激发的线性和非线性贡献，并识别了非线性成分的微观起源。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是理解在强耦合腔中分子极化激元在瞬时光驱动下，能量如何在电子、光子和振动自由度之间重新分布，为超快极化激元实验提供理论框架。
AI.method: 使用场驱动的Holstein-Tavis-Cummings模型，在单激发近似和平均场描述两种方法下，分析脉冲持续时间和强度对振动动力学的影响。
AI.result: 两种方法得出一致的振动激发标度关系，区分了振动激发的线性和非线性贡献（分别对应脉冲强度的线性和二次依赖），识别非线性成分源于极化激元介导的脉冲内受激拉曼过程。
AI.conclusion: 建立了一个统一框架来理解脉冲极化激元驱动下的振动激发，为超快极化激元实验的解释和控制提供指导，同时分析了特定脉冲条件下两种方法的差异。

title: Exascale Multi-Task Graph Foundation Models for Imbalanced, Multi-Fidelity Atomistic Data
summary: We present an exascale workflow for materials discovery using atomistic graph foundation models built on HydraGNN. We jointly train on 16 open first-principles datasets (544+ million structures covering 85+ elements) using a multi-task architecture with per-dataset heads and a scalable ADIOS2/DDStore data pipeline. On Frontier, we execute six large-scale DeepHyper hyperparameter optimization campaigns in FP64 and promote the top-performing message-passing models to sustained 2,048-node training, yielding a PaiNN-based lead model. The resulting model enables billion-scale screening, evaluating 1.1 billion atomistic structures in 50 seconds, compressing a workload that would require years of first-principles computation, and supports data-scarce fine-tuning across diverse downstream tasks. We quantify precision-performance tradeoffs (BF16/FP32/FP64), demonstrate transfer across twelve chemically diverse downstream tasks, and establish seamless strong- and weak-scaling across Frontier, Aurora, and Perlmutter. This work allows fast and reliable exploration of vast chemical design spaces that are otherwise inaccessible to first-principles methods.

AI.tldr: 开发了基于HydraGNN的原子图基础模型，用于材料发现，通过大规模多任务训练和高效数据管道，实现十亿级结构快速筛选，压缩了原本需要数年的第一性原理计算工作量。
AI.motivation: 传统第一性原理计算方法计算成本高、速度慢，难以探索广阔的化学设计空间。需要开发能够快速可靠地探索大规模化学设计空间的方法，这些空间对第一性原理方法来说通常是不可访问的。
AI.method: 使用HydraGNN构建原子图基础模型，在16个开放第一性原理数据集（5.44亿+结构，覆盖85+元素）上进行联合训练，采用多任务架构和每个数据集独立的头部。使用可扩展的ADIOS2/DDStore数据管道，在Frontier上进行大规模DeepHyper超参数优化，选择最佳的消息传递模型进行2048节点持续训练，得到基于PaiNN的领先模型。
AI.result: 模型在50秒内评估了11亿个原子结构，压缩了原本需要数年第一性原理计算的工作量。量化了精度-性能权衡（BF16/FP32/FP64），在12个化学多样性下游任务上展示了迁移能力，并在Frontier、Aurora和Perlmutter系统上实现了无缝的强扩展和弱扩展。
AI.conclusion: 该工作实现了对广阔化学设计空间的快速可靠探索，这些空间对第一性原理方法通常是不可访问的。通过原子图基础模型和大规模计算基础设施的结合，为材料发现提供了高效的解决方案。

title: Extracting conformal data from finite-size tensor-network flow in critical two-dimensional classical models
summary: We present a general framework for extracting conformal data from critical two-dimensional classical lattice models using finite-size tensor-network flow. The central idea is to identify, from transfer-matrix spectra, a self-consistent finite-size window together with a crossover scale that separates the finite-size-scaling regime from the finite-entanglement-scaling regime induced by bond-dimension truncation. Within this window, the central charge, scaling dimensions, and conformal spins can be estimated without requiring a unique critical fixed-point tensor or detailed prior knowledge of the underlying conformal field theory. We benchmark the framework using three tensor-network renormalization schemes for the critical two-dimensional Ising and three-state clock models. Across schemes, we find robust universal behavior below the crossover scale, enabling accurate extraction of conformal data up to relatively high conformal levels. The analysis also yields a natural operational definition of entanglement scaling for classical tensor-network calculations and, in turn, a complementary estimator of the central charge.

AI.tldr: 提出一个从二维经典格点模型提取共形数据的通用框架，通过有限尺寸张量网络流识别转移矩阵谱中的自洽窗口，分离有限尺寸标度与有限纠缠标度，无需临界固定点张量即可估计中心荷、标度维度和共形自旋。
AI.motivation: 传统方法需要精确的临界固定点张量或详细的共形场论知识来提取共形数据。本文旨在开发一个更通用的框架，能够在不需要这些先验知识的情况下，从有限尺寸张量网络计算中稳健地提取共形数据。
AI.method: 使用有限尺寸张量网络流方法，通过分析转移矩阵谱识别自洽的有限尺寸窗口和交叉尺度。该窗口分离有限尺寸标度区域和由键维截断引起的有限纠缠标度区域。在窗口内，可以直接估计中心荷、标度维度和共形自旋等共形数据。
AI.result: 在临界二维Ising模型和三态时钟模型上使用三种张量网络重整化方案进行基准测试。所有方案在交叉尺度以下都表现出稳健的普适行为，能够准确提取相对较高共形能级的共形数据。同时获得了经典张量网络计算中纠缠标度的自然操作定义。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为从经典格点模型提取共形数据提供了通用且稳健的方法，无需临界固定点张量或详细的共形场论知识。同时为经典张量网络计算中的纠缠标度提供了新的操作定义，并提供了中心荷的补充估计器。

title: Fluctuating Pair Density Wave in Finite-temperature Phase Diagram of the $t$-$t^\prime$ Hubbard Model
summary: The Hubbard model and its extensions are canonical theoretical frameworks for understanding correlated electronic states, including those in high-$T_c$ cuprates. Here, we use state-of-the-art thermal tensor network method to map out the temperature-doping phase diagram of the $t$-$t^\prime$ Hubbard model. On the electron-doped side, we find a $d$-wave superconducting (dSC) regime, supporting the scenario of high-$T_c$ superconductivity. In contrast, on the hole-doped side, no robust dSC phase is detected. Instead, a finite-temperature regime dominated by strong pair-density-wave (PDW) fluctuations emerges, which may eventually give way to charge density wave order upon further cooling. The PDW state exhibits inter-arc pairing with net momentum near $(0, π)$, distinct from the zero-momentum pairing in conventional dSC. Furthermore, these fluctuating PDW states occupy the lower portion of the pseudogap regime on the hole-doped side. We provide a comprehensive finite-temperature perspective consistent with previous ground-state studies, shedding new light on pairing instabilities and exotic electronic states in high-$T_c$ superconductors.

AI.tldr: 使用热张量网络方法研究t-t' Hubbard模型的温度-掺杂相图，发现电子掺杂侧存在d波超导，而空穴掺杂侧没有稳定dSC相，而是出现强对密度波涨落，可能进一步冷却后转变为电荷密度波序。
AI.motivation: Hubbard模型是理解关联电子态（包括高温超导铜氧化物）的标准理论框架，但需要更精确地研究其温度-掺杂相图，特别是电子掺杂和空穴掺杂侧的超导性质差异。
AI.method: 使用先进的热张量网络方法，对t-t' Hubbard模型进行系统研究，绘制温度-掺杂相图。
AI.result: 电子掺杂侧发现d波超导相，支持高温超导机制；空穴掺杂侧未检测到稳定dSC相，而是出现强对密度波涨落，具有(0,π)净动量配对特征，占据赝能隙区下部。
AI.conclusion: 研究提供了与先前基态研究一致的有限温度视角，揭示了高温超导体中配对不稳定性和奇异电子态的新机制，特别是空穴掺杂侧对密度波涨落的重要性。

title: Amplitudes of Hall field-induced resistance oscillations with a two-harmonic density of states
summary: We derive explicit strong-field asymptotics for the normalized differential resistance in Hall field-induced resistance oscillations (HIRO) within the Vavilov-Aleiner-Glazman kinetic framework. For a single-harmonic density of states, the leading oscillation amplitude is set by the full backscattering rate $1/τ(π)$. Extending the theory to a two-harmonic density of states, we show that the off-diagonal mixed kernel $γ_{12}$ admits an exact single-integral representation, from which the strong-field asymptotics follow directly. The resulting odd harmonics, notably $m=1$ and $m=3$, have coefficients determined by combinations of $1/τ(0)$ and $1/τ(π)$, while the leading $m=2$ amplitude remains unchanged. On exact-kernel mock data generated and fit within the same model, with $τ_{\rm tr}$ and $τ_{\rm in}$ held fixed, the resulting extraction protocol recovers $τ_q$, $τ(π)$, and -- when the $m=1,3$ harmonics are resolved -- $τ(0)$ to sub-percent accuracy, with $τ(0)$ providing a consistency check on the disorder description.

AI.tldr: 论文推导了霍尔场诱导电阻振荡中归一化微分电阻的显式强场渐近行为，建立了从实验数据提取多种散射时间的精确协议。
AI.motivation: 霍尔场诱导电阻振荡（HIRO）是研究二维电子系统中电子输运的重要现象。现有理论框架（Vavilov-Aleiner-Glazman）需要更精确的强场渐近表达式，以便从实验数据中可靠地提取不同的散射时间参数，从而更深入地理解无序散射机制。
AI.method:
1. 在Vavilov-Aleiner-Glazman动力学框架下推导归一化微分电阻的显式强场渐近表达式
2. 针对单谐波态密度，确定主导振荡幅度由全背散射率1/τ(π)决定
3. 扩展到双谐波态密度，推导非对角混合核γ₁₂的精确单积分表示
4. 从该表示直接得到强场渐近行为
5. 在相同模型内生成精确核模拟数据并进行拟合验证
AI.result:
1. 奇次谐波（特别是m=1和m=3）的系数由1/τ(0)和1/τ(π)的组合决定
2. 主导的m=2谐波幅度保持不变
3. 在固定输运时间τ_tr和内部时间τ_in的情况下，提取协议能够以亚百分之一的精度恢复τ_q、τ(π)
4. 当m=1,3谐波可分辨时，还能恢复τ(0)，为无序描述提供一致性检验
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了从霍尔场诱导电阻振荡实验数据中精确提取多种散射时间的理论框架和协议。通过强场渐近分析，不仅能够获得量子散射时间τ_q和背散射时间τ(π)，还能在分辨奇次谐波时获得前向散射时间τ(0)，为全面表征无序散射机制提供了有力工具。

title: Enhancing Neural-Network Variational Monte Carlo through Basis Transformation
summary: Neural-network variational Monte Carlo (NNVMC) has emerged as a powerful tool for solving quantum many-body problems, yet systematic pathways for improving its accuracy remain largely heuristic. Here, we introduce a physically motivated basis transformation for NNVMC that enhances variational expressivity without increasing the complexity of the neural-network ansatz itself. By formulating the many-body wave function in a Gaussian basis, we introduce a single learnable locality parameter, $α$, that reshapes the target ground state into a more learnable representation. This approach introduces minimal computational overhead and can be readily combined with existing neural-network architectures. Using the three-dimensional homogeneous electron gas as a benchmark, we show that the optimized basis transformation consistently lowers the variational energy for both FermiNet and message-passing neural-network architectures. Notably, for the latter, it enables a more precise determination of the Fermi liquid to Wigner crystal phase transition. More broadly, our results highlight basis transformation as a new route to improving NNVMC in continuous space, showing that accuracy can be enhanced not only by refining the ansatz but also by making the target ground state easier to represent.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于高斯基变换的NNVMC方法，通过可学习的局域性参数α重塑基态波函数表示，在不增加神经网络复杂度的情况下提升变分表达能力。
AI.motivation: 虽然神经网络变分蒙特卡洛（NNVMC）已成为解决量子多体问题的强大工具，但系统提升其准确性的方法仍主要依赖启发式经验。需要一种物理驱动的改进途径。
AI.method: 提出物理驱动的基变换方法：将多体波函数表示为高斯基形式，引入单个可学习的局域性参数α，将目标基态重塑为更易学习的表示。该方法计算开销小，可与现有神经网络架构（如FermiNet和消息传递神经网络）结合。
AI.result: 在三维均匀电子气基准测试中，优化的基变换持续降低了FermiNet和消息传递神经网络的变分能量。特别地，对于后者，该方法能更精确地确定费米液体到维格纳晶体的相变点。
AI.conclusion: 基变换为连续空间中NNVMC的改进提供了新途径，表明准确性不仅可以通过改进波函数拟设来提升，还可以通过使目标基态更易表示来实现。

title: Inelastic neutron scattering study on the AFM uniform spin-1/2 chain compound CuSb2O6
summary: We carried out inelastic neutron scattering experiments on a powdered sample of the antiferromagnetic (AFM) uniform spin-1/2 chain compound CuSb2O6.The magnetic excitations appear in the energy range of 1.8 to 13 meV at 2.5 K below the AFM transition temperature (TN = 8.7 K).The gap value (1.8 meV) is close to that evaluated from the specific heat (1.51 meV). The excitations at 12.5 K (> TN) appear gapless. Thus, the 1.8 meV gap is caused by some anisotropy in spin-wave excitations. The gap excitations are strongest at 0.48 corresponding to a length of 0.66 nm. This result is consistent with the theoretical one that the interaction in a Cu pair with a length of 0.65562 nm (Jab) is strongest. The magnetic excitations can be explained by the AFM uniform XXZ chain with Jab = 6.437 meV and DJab = 0.063 meV. The 1.8 meV gap is caused by the small Ising anisotropy (DJab/Jab = 0.0098).

AI.tldr: 通过非弹性中子散射研究CuSb2O6的反铁磁均匀自旋-1/2链化合物，发现1.8 meV的能隙由自旋波激发的各向异性引起，可用AFM均匀XXZ链模型解释。
AI.motivation: 研究CuSb2O6这种反铁磁均匀自旋-1/2链化合物的磁激发特性，特别是能隙的起源和磁相互作用的性质。
AI.method: 使用非弹性中子散射实验测量粉末样品，在2.5 K（低于TN = 8.7 K）和12.5 K（高于TN）下观察磁激发。
AI.result: 在2.5 K观察到1.8-13 meV能量范围的磁激发，1.8 meV能隙与比热测量结果（1.51 meV）接近；12.5 K时激发无间隙；最强激发对应0.66 nm长度，与理论预测的0.65562 nm Cu对相互作用一致。
AI.conclusion: 磁激发可用AFM均匀XXZ链模型解释（Jab = 6.437 meV，DJab = 0.063 meV），1.8 meV能隙由小的伊辛各向异性（DJab/Jab = 0.0098）引起。

title: Host-guest co-amorphous structure revealed by the suppression of the first sharp diffraction peak in isotactic poly(4-methyl-1-pentene)
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures. Supplemental Material available (1 page, 1 figure)
summary: While host-guest co-crystals are well established, and co-amorphous solids are recognized in materials science, the concept of a host-guest co-amorphous structure remains largely unexplored. A potential analogue is seen in SiO2 glass under high pressure with helium as a pressure medium; the drop in compressibility in this system is ascribed to helium atoms occupying internal voids. In this study, we investigated a semicrystalline polymer, isotactic poly(4-methyl-pentene-1) (P4MP1), which shares key characteristics with SiO2 glass, particularly regarding the first sharp diffraction peak (FSDP). The FSDP in P4MP1 is attributed to internal voids, as evidenced by its suppression under pressure and recovery upon decompression for molten P4MP1. Notably, the response to helium as a pressure medium is also known to parallel the behavior observed in SiO2 glass. Here, we analyzed two-dimensional X-ray diffraction (2D-XRD) patterns of stretched P4MP1 and found a suppression of FSDP when P4MP1 is immersed in decane. The use of stretched samples enabled the clear isolation of the amorphous FSDP from overlapping crystalline diffractions. Our findings reveal the existence of a host-guest co-amorphous system at room temperature and atmospheric pressure, in which decane molecules occupy the amorphous host matrix of P4MP1. Unlike conventional co-amorphous mixtures, this structure is defined by the specific accommodation of guests within the host's inherent voids. Intriguingly, the signature of this structure in diffraction measurements, manifested as changes in the FSDP intensity ratio, may be regarded to parallel the variations in Bragg peak intensity ratios in host-guest co-crystals. Since selective sorption and guest exchange are well-known in co-crystals, hosts capable of forming co-amorphous structures will be promising materials for molecular sieves, or more generally, liquid-phase molecular sieves.

AI.tldr: 首次提出"主客体共非晶"概念，在室温常压下发现P4MP1聚合物与癸烷形成共非晶结构，癸烷分子占据聚合物非晶基体中的固有空隙
AI.motivation: 主客体共晶体系已很成熟，共非晶固体在材料科学中也得到认可，但主客体共非晶结构的概念尚未被探索。SiO2玻璃在高压氦气介质中表现出压缩性下降的现象，启发研究者探索类似的主客体共非晶体系
AI.method: 使用拉伸的P4MP1聚合物样品，通过二维X射线衍射（2D-XRD）分析，在癸烷浸泡条件下观察第一尖锐衍射峰（FSDP）的变化。拉伸样品使非晶FSDP与结晶衍射峰分离
AI.result: 发现癸烷浸泡导致P4MP1的FSDP被抑制，表明癸烷分子占据了聚合物非晶基体中的内部空隙，形成了主客体共非晶结构。FSDP强度比的变化类似于共晶中布拉格峰强度比的变化
AI.conclusion: 首次在室温常压下证实了主客体共非晶结构的存在，这种结构不同于传统的共非晶混合物，具有选择性吸附和客体交换潜力，有望用于分子筛特别是液相分子筛材料

title: Atomic-scale order enables high thermal boundary conductance at $β$-Ga$_2$O$_3$/4H-SiC interfaces
summary: Thermal boundary conductance (TBC) at dissimilar interfaces imposes a fundamental limit on electronic device performance, yet predicting and understanding heat transport across realistic, disordered boundaries remains elusive. Here, we develop a computational framework that combines machine-learned interatomic potentials with lattice dynamics to address the long-standing problem of how interfacial structure, from disordered to atomically sharp, affects thermal transport in the technologically important $β$-Ga$_2$O$_3$/4H-SiC heterostructure. By explicitly accounting for phonon wave-particle duality, we show that interfacial disorder introduces additional interfacial phonon modes that facilitate vibrational impedance matching between the two highly dissimilar crystals, yet it simultaneously disrupts interfacial phonon coherence and limits the potential heat-transport benefit. Our atomistic simulations further indicate that restoring atomic-scale order preserves coherence and yields markedly higher conductance. These insights motivate the controlled epitaxial growth of $β$-Ga$_2$O$_3$/4H-SiC heterostructures with systematically tuned interfacial order. Experimental measurements validate our predictions, achieving a record-high TBC of 231 MW m$^{-2}$ K$^{-1}$ at atomically sharp junctions. Beyond the immediate implications for $β$-Ga$_2$O$_3$-based power electronics, our results establish the preservation of interfacial phonon coherence as an effective strategy for mitigating thermal bottlenecks in mismatched systems.

AI.tldr: 该研究开发了结合机器学习原子势和晶格动力学的计算框架，揭示了界面无序如何通过引入额外声子模式促进振动阻抗匹配，但同时破坏声子相干性限制热传输。实验验证了原子级尖锐界面可获得创纪录的高热边界电导。
AI.motivation: 热边界电导对电子器件性能有根本性限制，但预测和理解真实无序界面的热传输仍很困难。需要研究界面结构（从无序到原子级尖锐）如何影响β-Ga₂O₃/4H-SiC异质结构的热传输。
AI.method: 开发了结合机器学习原子势和晶格动力学的计算框架，考虑声子波粒二象性，通过原子模拟研究界面无序对热传输的影响，并通过实验测量验证预测。
AI.result: 界面无序引入额外界面声子模式促进振动阻抗匹配，但同时破坏界面声子相干性限制热传输效益。原子级有序界面保持相干性并显著提高电导。实验验证了原子级尖锐界面实现创纪录的231 MW m⁻² K⁻¹高热边界电导。
AI.conclusion: 保持界面声子相干性是缓解不匹配系统中热瓶颈的有效策略。研究结果不仅对β-Ga₂O₃功率电子器件有直接意义，更为不匹配系统的热管理提供了新策略。

title: Phase Transitions as the Breakdown of Statistical Indistinguishability
summary:
We introduce a novel characterization of phase transitions based on hypothesis testing.
  In our formulation, a phase transition is defined as the breakdown of statistical indistinguishability under vanishing parameter perturbations in the thermodynamic limit.
  This perspective provides a general, order-parameter-free framework that does not rely on model-specific insights or learning procedures.
  We show that conventional approaches, such as those based on the Binder parameter, can be reinterpreted as special cases within this framework.
  As a concrete realization, we employ a distribution-free two-sample run test and demonstrate that the critical point of the two-dimensional Ising model is accurately identified without prior knowledge of the order parameter.

AI.tldr: 提出基于假设检验的相变新表征，将相变定义为热力学极限下统计不可区分性的破坏，无需序参量或模型特定知识
AI.motivation: 传统相变表征通常依赖序参量或模型特定知识，需要更一般、不依赖特定模型的相变定义框架
AI.method: 使用基于假设检验的统计不可区分性框架，将相变定义为参数微小扰动下统计分布的不可区分性破坏；具体实现采用无分布双样本游程检验
AI.result: 成功识别二维伊辛模型的临界点，无需序参量先验知识；传统方法（如Binder参数）可作为该框架的特例重新解释
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种通用、不依赖序参量的相变表征框架，为相变研究提供了新的统计视角和工具

title: Persistence of large and gate-tunable anisotropic magnetoresistance in an atomically thin antiferromagnet
summary: Anisotropic magnetoresistance (AMR) offers a robust electrical readout of antiferromagnetic (AFM) states, playing a central role in the rapidly advancing field of AFM spintronics. Despite its great versatility, electrical probing of the Néel vector via AMR remains challenging in the ultrathin limit due to interface disorder and reduced dimensionality. Here, we demonstrate electrical readout of the Néel vector down to 1.3 nm (two layers) in the two-dimensional van der Waals (vdW) AFM semiconductor NiPS3. Leveraging spin-flop-mediated rotation of the Néel vector and using both transistor and tunnel-junction device geometries, we identify two distinct AMR contributions in NiPS3, that dominate at low and high charge densities, respectively. We achieve full gate control over these contributions, enabling tunability of both the magnitude and sign of magnetoresistance. Our results establish semiconducting vdW antiferromagnets as a rich platform for studying AMR in the ultrathin limit, opening new avenues for multifunctional AFM spintronic devices.

AI.tldr: 该研究在二维范德华反铁磁半导体NiPS3中实现了低至1.3纳米（两层）的奈尔矢量电学读取，通过自旋翻转机制和不同器件结构，发现了两种磁阻贡献并实现了全栅极调控。
AI.motivation: 各向异性磁阻（AMR）在反铁磁自旋电子学中至关重要，但在超薄极限下，由于界面无序和维度降低，通过AMR电学探测奈尔矢量仍然具有挑战性。
AI.method: 使用二维范德华反铁磁半导体NiPS3，通过自旋翻转介导的奈尔矢量旋转，采用晶体管和隧道结两种器件结构，研究低电荷密度和高电荷密度下的不同AMR贡献。
AI.result: 实现了低至1.3纳米（两层）的奈尔矢量电学读取，识别了两种主导不同电荷密度区域的AMR贡献，并实现了对磁阻大小和符号的全栅极调控。
AI.conclusion: 半导体范德华反铁磁体为研究超薄极限下的AMR提供了丰富平台，为多功能反铁磁自旋电子器件开辟了新途径。

title: Reweighting Estimators for Density Response in Path Integral Monte Carlo: Applications to linear, nonlinear and cross-species density response
summary: We present density response estimators for Monte Carlo simulations that are based on a reweighting procedure, where the samples of an unperturbed system are used to estimate the properties of a system perturbed by an external harmonic potential. This allows the linear and nonlinear static density response to be estimated purely from simulations of the unperturbed system. The method is demonstrated for the uniform electron gas under warm dense matter and strongly coupled conditions using ab initio path integral Monte Carlo simulations. The performance of the method with respect to the number of particles and the number of imaginary time slices is investigated. The scheme is generalised to consider multiple external perturbations, acting on different species and with different wavenumbers, giving one access to additional cross-species density response functions and the complete quadratic response function resolved for both wave number arguments through mode coupling. The flexibility of the methodology opens the possibility to investigate numerous new density response properties to further advance our understanding of interacting quantum many-body systems across a broad range of applications.

AI.tldr: 提出基于重加权程序的密度响应估计器，通过未扰动系统的样本估计受外谐波势扰动系统的性质，可仅从未扰动系统模拟中估计线性和非线性静态密度响应。
AI.motivation: 开发一种新方法，能够仅从未扰动系统的模拟中估计量子多体系统的密度响应，避免对每个扰动系统进行单独模拟，提高计算效率并扩展可研究的响应性质范围。
AI.method: 基于重加权程序，使用未扰动系统的样本通过外谐波势扰动来估计系统的性质。方法可推广到考虑多个外部扰动，作用于不同物种和不同波数，提供交叉物种密度响应函数和完整的二次响应函数。
AI.result: 在暖稠密物质和强耦合条件下的均匀电子气体中，通过从头算路径积分蒙特卡洛模拟验证了该方法。研究了粒子数和虚时间切片数对方法性能的影响，展示了方法的灵活性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为研究广泛的相互作用量子多体系统提供了新的密度响应性质研究可能性，能够进一步推进我们对这些系统的理解，具有广泛的应用前景。

title: Inductance Meets Memory in the Quantum Magnet Mn3Si2Te6
summary: Orbital degrees of freedom offer a largely untapped route to emergent dynamical phenomena in correlated quantum materials. However, it remains unclear whether collective orbital states can intrinsically generate both reactive and memory functionalities in a bulk system. Here we show that in the ferrimagnet Mn3Si2Te6, nonequilibrium reconfiguration of chiral orbital currents produces both emergent inductance and nonvolatile memristance as intrinsic properties of a single crystal. At low frequency and under a magnetic field along the c axis, coherent orbital-current domains generate robust clockwise inductive I-V loops. At higher frequency and low field, current-driven first-order reconfiguration leads to incomplete reversal and metastable trapping, producing an intrinsic electromotive force and a finite remanent voltage at zero current. These results establish orbital currents as a class of quantum state variables that encode both reactive and memory functionalities, opening routes toward intrinsically reconfigurable and energy-efficient electronic systems.

AI.tldr: Mn3Si2Te6晶体中手性轨道电流的非平衡重构同时产生电感效应和忆阻效应，为轨道自由度作为量子状态变量提供了实验证据。
AI.motivation: 探索轨道自由度是否能作为量子状态变量，在体材料中同时实现反应性（电感）和记忆性（忆阻）功能。
AI.method: 研究Mn3Si2Te6铁磁体的非平衡手性轨道电流重构，分析低频下的相干轨道电流畴产生电感效应，以及高频下的电流驱动一级重构产生忆阻效应。
AI.result: 在c轴磁场下，低频时产生顺时针电感I-V回路；高频低场下，电流驱动重构导致不完全反转和亚稳态捕获，产生固有电动势和零电流剩余电压。
AI.conclusion: 轨道电流可作为一类量子状态变量，同时编码反应性和记忆性功能，为开发本征可重构和节能电子系统开辟了新途径。

title: Device-area selection of memristive transport regimes in epitaxial $Hf_{0.5}Zr_{0.5}O_{2}$-based ferroelectric devices
summary: Ferroelectric memristive devices based on hafnia are promising systems for neuromorphic electronics, yet the interplay between polarization-modulated resistive changes and defect-mediated transport often leads to complex and debated switching mechanisms. Here, we investigate this competition in epitaxial Hf$_{0.5}$Zr$_{0.5}$O$_2$/La$_{0.67}$Sr$_{0.33}$MnO$_3$ heterostructures with Pt top electrodes by combining structural, ferroelectric, and memristive characterization with a statistical analysis across a broad range of device areas spanning three orders of magnitude. We identify two distinct memristive regimes with opposite resistance--voltage chiralities. Small devices exhibit a low-resistance state that scales inversely with area, consistent with area-distributed tunneling transport, while larger devices display an area-independent resistance indicative of localized conductive channels. A statistical nucleation model quantitatively captures this behavior and yields a crossover characteristic area $A^* \approx 10^3~μ\mathrm{m}^2$. This crossover also correlates with the onset of ferroelectric wake-up in larger devices, linking conductive-channel nucleation and oxygen-vacancy redistribution within a unified physical picture. These results establish lateral device size as a key parameter controlling the dominant transport mechanism in epitaxial hafnia-based devices.

AI.tldr: 研究揭示了Hf₀.₅Zr₀.₅O₂铁电忆阻器中两种不同的电阻开关机制，其主导机制由器件横向尺寸决定，存在约10³ μm²的临界面积。
AI.motivation: 铪基铁电忆阻器在神经形态电子学中具有潜力，但其极化调制电阻变化与缺陷介导输运之间的相互作用导致复杂的开关机制争议，需要系统研究。
AI.method: 采用外延Hf₀.₅Zr₀.₅O₂/La₀.₆₇Sr₀.₃₃MnO₃异质结结构，结合结构、铁电和忆阻特性表征，对跨越三个数量级的器件面积进行统计分析。
AI.result: 发现两种具有相反电阻-电压手性的忆阻机制：小器件呈现面积反比缩放的低阻态（面积分布式隧穿输运），大器件显示面积无关电阻（局域化导电通道）。统计成核模型定量描述该行为，得到临界面积A*≈10³ μm²。
AI.conclusion: 横向器件尺寸是控制外延铪基器件主导输运机制的关键参数，将导电通道成核与氧空位再分布统一于同一物理图像，为大面积器件中铁电唤醒现象提供解释。

title: General perturbative framework for kinetics of rare transitions in 1-dimensional active particle systems
summary: We present a theoretical framework that enables investigating rare transitions in a general model of an active particle in an external potential, with the thermal Active Ornstein-Uhlenbeck Particle (AOUP) appearing as a special case. Using a projection-operator formalism, we compute transition rates perturbatively in two distinct asymptotic regimes. In the regime of small persistence times-where the activity evolves much faster than the particle's position-integrating out the activity reproduces the rates previously reported in the literature. In the opposite regime of large persistence times, we instead integrate out the position and obtain the corresponding rates analytically. Together, these asymptotic expansions uniquely specify a rational approximation that remains accurate across intermediate persistence times. As a result, we obtain an analytic expression for the rate valid across all persistence times and activity strengths in the rare-event limit, which are in excellent agreement with numerical simulations. The presented framework applies to rare transitions in a broad class of driven systems.

AI.tldr: 提出一个理论框架研究活性粒子在外势场中的稀有跃迁，通过投影算子方法计算两个渐近区域的跃迁速率，并构建跨所有持续时间的统一解析表达式。
AI.motivation: 研究活性粒子（特别是热活性Ornstein-Uhlenbeck粒子）在外部势场中的稀有跃迁问题，现有方法通常局限于特定参数区域，需要发展一个统一的理论框架来处理所有持续时间和活性强度。
AI.method: 使用投影算子形式体系，在两个渐近区域进行微扰计算：小持续时间区域（活性演化远快于粒子位置）和大持续时间区域（活性演化远慢于粒子位置），然后通过有理近似构建跨中间持续时间的统一表达式。
AI.result: 得到了一个在稀有事件极限下对所有持续时间和活性强度都有效的跃迁速率解析表达式，与数值模拟结果高度一致。该框架可推广到更广泛的驱动系统。
AI.conclusion: 提出的理论框架成功解决了活性粒子稀有跃迁问题，提供了跨所有参数区域的统一解析解，为研究更广泛驱动系统中的稀有跃迁奠定了基础。

title: Observation of ring states in a delicate topological insulator
summary: Topological insulators are typically characterized by particularly stable properties, such as global invariants, and can be identified by probing their robust surface states. A recently discovered novel form of band topology, delicate topology, challenges this paradigm: its defining property, multicellularity, can be removed by introducing a coupling to local orbitals anywhere in the spectrum, even far above the relevant band gap. This makes it hard to diagnose delicate topology with conventional probes that access only low-energy degrees of freedom. Here, we introduce strong local impurities as a spectroscopic probe of a delicate topological insulator which we realize in a phononic metamaterial. By tuning the impurity strength and performing orbital-resolved readout, we observe recently proposed indicators of topology: ring states, in-gap bound states whose frequencies remain pinned in the strong-impurity limit while their real-space profiles form a pronounced ring around the impurity site. We find that these ring states persist even when the multicellularity in our system is removed by a weakly hybridizing additional orbital. Our results establish impurity-induced ring states as probes of complex multiband physics, including delicate topological phases.

AI.tldr: 通过引入强局域杂质作为光谱探针，在声子超材料中观测到环形态，证实了环形态可作为精细拓扑绝缘体的诊断工具，即使多胞性被移除后环形态仍然存在。
AI.motivation: 精细拓扑绝缘体（delicate topology）的拓扑特性（多胞性）可以通过在能谱中任何位置引入局域轨道耦合而被移除，这使得传统低能探测方法难以诊断精细拓扑。需要开发新的探测方法来识别这种拓扑相。
AI.method: 在声子超材料中实现精细拓扑绝缘体，引入强局域杂质作为光谱探针，通过调节杂质强度并进行轨道分辨读取，观测环形态（ring states）——带隙束缚态，其频率在强杂质极限下保持固定，实空间分布形成围绕杂质位点的明显环形结构。
AI.result: 成功观测到环形态，这些态在强杂质极限下频率保持固定，形成围绕杂质的环形分布。更重要的是，即使通过弱杂化附加轨道移除系统的多胞性后，环形态仍然存在。
AI.conclusion: 杂质诱导的环形态可作为复杂多带物理（包括精细拓扑相）的有效探针，为诊断精细拓扑绝缘体提供了新的实验方法。

title: Multi-reference GW approximation for strongly correlated molecules
summary: The GW approximation is a cornerstone of many-body perturbation theory for computing single-particle excitations, yet it fundamentally breaks down in strongly correlated systems where the single-reference picture fails. To overcome this long-standing limitation, we introduce the multi-reference GW (MR-GW) approximation, which incorporates strong correlation effects non-perturbatively into an interacting multi-determinantal zeroth-order reference. While the standard Dyson equation is inapplicable in this setting, we show that the GW approximation can be naturally generalized by developing a rigorous diagrammatic framework with an interacting reference. Specifically, we define the MR-GW self-energy using a diagrammatic expansion based on the generalized Dyson equation, and utilize a multi-reference random phase approximation for the screened interaction, which captures many-body processes absent in standard GW. Applications to challenging strongly correlated molecules demonstrate that MR-GW seamlessly captures both strong and weak correlations, yielding more accurate ionization potentials and recovering complex many-body satellites missed by standard $GW$. This work establishes a rigorous diagrammatic paradigm for extending ab initio Green's function methods into the strongly correlated regime.

AI.tldr: MR-GW方法通过引入多参考框架，将GW近似扩展到强关联体系，解决了标准GW在强关联系统中的失效问题。
AI.motivation: GW近似是计算单粒子激发的核心方法，但在强关联系统中会失效，因为单参考图像不再适用。需要开发能够处理强关联效应的新方法。
AI.method: 提出多参考GW（MR-GW）近似，基于相互作用的多个行列式零阶参考，构建严格的图论框架。使用广义Dyson方程定义MR-GW自能，并采用多参考随机相位近似处理屏蔽相互作用。
AI.result: 应用于挑战性的强关联分子表明，MR-GW能够同时捕捉强关联和弱关联效应，提供更准确的电离势，并恢复标准GW缺失的复杂多体卫星峰。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作为将从头算格林函数方法扩展到强关联区域建立了严格的图论范式，解决了GW近似在强关联系统中的长期限制。

title: Electronic Signature of Melting Onset in Polycrystalline Copper at Extreme Conditions
summary: Ultrafast melting is fundamentally a structural transition of the ionic lattice, but this rearrangement also reshapes the electronic properties by changing the energy landscape and scattering mechanisms. Although the electrons react almost instantaneously, it is not {\it a priori} clear how much lattice disorder is required for a significant response. Here, we show that the onset of melting already produces a clear electronic signature in polycrystalline copper. Using single-shot terahertz time-domain spectroscopy on thin films excited over a wide range of laser fluences, we infer the transient conductivity during the first picoseconds after excitation. The data, supported by two-temperature molecular-dynamics simulations, show that before melting, electron transport is substantially limited by grain-boundary scattering and that melting strongly suppresses this channel. As melting begins at these interfaces, we observe a transient increase in the conductivity that directly marks the onset of the phase transition. More broadly, these results show that ionic and electronic relaxation stages are closely coupled in nonequilibrium laser-driven matter and that optical measurements can resolve distinct stages of melting.

AI.tldr: 通过太赫兹时域光谱技术，研究人员发现铜薄膜熔化起始阶段会产生明显的电导率瞬态增加，这直接标记了相变的开始。
AI.motivation: 研究超快熔化过程中晶格结构变化如何影响电子性质，特别是需要多少晶格无序才能产生显著的电子响应。
AI.method: 使用单次太赫兹时域光谱技术测量铜薄膜在宽范围激光能量密度激发后的瞬态电导率，并结合双温度分子动力学模拟进行验证。
AI.result: 熔化前电子输运主要受晶界散射限制，熔化开始后该散射通道被强烈抑制，导致电导率瞬态增加，这直接标记了相变的起始。
AI.conclusion: 在非平衡激光驱动物质中，离子和电子弛豫阶段紧密耦合，光学测量能够分辨熔化的不同阶段，熔化起始阶段已产生明显的电子特征。

title: On the role of the slowest observable in one-dimensional Markov processes to construct quasi-exactly-solvable generators with $N=2$ explicit levels
summary: The construction of Quasi-Exactly-Solvable quantum Hamiltonians where only the two first eigenstates $Φ_0(x)$ and $Φ_1(x)$ of energies $E_0$ and $E_1$ are explicit is revisited from the point of view of one-dimensional Markov processes satisfying detailed-balance, whose generators are related to quantum Hamiltonians via similarity transformations. Here the lowest energy vanishes $E_0=0$ and is associated the conservation of probability and to the steady state $P_*(x)$, while $E_1>0$ is the rate that governs the exponential relaxation towards the steady-state, and is associated to the slowest observable $L_1(x)$ that corresponds to the ratio $ \frac{Φ_1(x) }{Φ_0(x)}$ of the two quantum eigenstates. Our main conclusion is that the Markov perspective leads to interesting re-interpretations and that the construction of quasi-exactly-solvable models with $N=2$ explicit levels is more intuitive and technically simpler if one takes the slowest observable $L_1(x)$ as the central object from which all the other properties can be reconstructed. This general approach is then applied to Fokker-Planck generators in continuous space and to Markov jump generators on the lattice.

AI.tldr: 该论文从马尔可夫过程视角重新审视准精确可解量子哈密顿量的构造，重点关注仅前两个本征态已知的情况，提出以最慢可观测量为中心对象的更直观构造方法。
AI.motivation: 论文旨在从一维马尔可夫过程的视角重新解释准精确可解量子哈密顿量的构造问题。传统量子力学方法构造仅前两个本征态已知的哈密顿量较为复杂，作者希望通过马尔可夫过程的详细平衡条件，提供更直观和简洁的构造框架。
AI.method: 采用马尔可夫过程与量子哈密顿量之间的相似变换关系，将量子本征态问题转化为马尔可夫过程分析。以最慢可观测量L₁(x)=Φ₁(x)/Φ₀(x)为中心对象，从该可观测量出发重构所有其他性质。该方法应用于连续空间的Fokker-Planck生成元和格点上的马尔可夫跳跃生成元。
AI.result: 马尔可夫视角为准精确可解模型的构造提供了新的物理解释：E₀=0对应概率守恒和稳态分布P_*(x)，E₁>0对应向稳态指数弛豫的速率。以最慢可观测量L₁(x)为中心的构造方法比传统量子力学方法更直观、技术更简单。
AI.conclusion: 马尔可夫过程视角为准精确可解量子模型提供了有价值的重新解释，特别是对于仅前两个本征态已知的情况。以最慢可观测量为中心对象的构造方法不仅更直观，而且技术实现更简单，为这类模型的构建提供了新思路。

title: Machine Learning and Deep Learning in Quantum Materials: Symmetry, Topology, and the Rise of Altermagnets
summary:
The landscape of condensed matter physics is facing an unprecedented data surge driven by high-throughput ab initio workflows and rapidly expanding experimental datasets. Traditional first-principles methods such as Density Functional Theory (DFT), despite their foundational role, suffer from cubic scaling, creating a major bottleneck when exploring the vast chemical space of quantum materials. This review analyzes how Machine Learning (ML) and Deep Learning (DL) are overcoming these limitations and accelerating the discovery of exotic phases of matter. We examine the shift from rigid descriptor-based models to flexible, symmetry-aware architectures, particularly E(3)-equivariant Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) that respect rotational and translational invariance. A central focus is the automated identification of topological phases, where ML models exploit symmetry indicators and elementary band representations to diagnose non-trivial topology without costly band structure integrations.
  The discussion culminates in a case study of the Altermagnet, a recently identified third class of magnetism beyond the ferromagnetic, antiferromagnetic dichotomy. We highlight how specialized AI search engines, combining graph theory with crystallographic symmetry analysis, have uncovered d-wave, g-wave, and even i-wave altermagnets, expanding the known landscape of magnetic order. The review concludes by addressing the interpretability gap and advocates for symbolic regression and active-learning frameworks to connect black-box predictions with experimentally verifiable mechanisms.

AI.tldr: 机器学习与深度学习正在加速量子材料发现，通过对称性感知架构（如E(3)-等变图神经网络）克服传统第一性原理方法的计算瓶颈，特别关注拓扑相自动识别和新型磁性材料（如Altermagnet）的发现。
AI.motivation: 凝聚态物理面临高通量第一性原理计算和实验数据爆炸式增长，传统密度泛函理论（DFT）的立方标度成为探索量子材料广阔化学空间的主要瓶颈，需要机器学习方法来加速新物相的发现。
AI.method: 从刚性描述符模型转向灵活的对称性感知架构，特别是E(3)-等变图神经网络（GNNs），保持旋转和平移不变性；利用对称性指标和基本能带表示自动识别拓扑相；结合图论和晶体学对称性分析的专用AI搜索引擎。
AI.result: 机器学习模型能够在不进行昂贵能带结构积分的情况下诊断非平凡拓扑；发现了Altermagnet（第三种磁性类别），包括d波、g波甚至i波Altermagnet，扩展了已知磁序的版图。
AI.conclusion: 需要解决可解释性差距，提倡使用符号回归和主动学习框架将黑盒预测与实验可验证机制联系起来，推动机器学习在凝聚态物理中的进一步发展。

title: Experimental quantification of electronic symmetry breaking through orbital hybridization phase
summary: Symmetry classification of crystal structures has been central to predicting physical properties of materials. While such structural classification identifies which physical responses are symmetry-allowed, the magnitudes of these responses are governed by the degree of symmetry breaking in the electronic state. However, a well-defined quantitative descriptor for the electronic symmetry breaking has been established only in limited cases such as electric polarization and magnetization. No analogous descriptor exists for most other types, including chirality. Here, we propose an experimental framework for quantifying electronic symmetry breaking from the anisotropy of valence electron density distribution. We show that the orbital hybridization phases governing this anisotropy can be uniquely determined under site symmetry constraints. Applying this framework to structurally chiral transition-metal silicides, we determine hybridization phases from their valence electron densities observed by synchrotron X-ray diffraction. From the obtained complex hybridization, we quantify an electronic chirality $χ$ and theoretically demonstrate that it is directly proportional to circular dichroism, establishing $χ$ as a predictive descriptor of chiral responses. This approach is systematically applicable to various point groups, offering a general route to quantifying electronic symmetry breaking and predicting associated physical properties.

AI.tldr: 提出通过价电子密度分布的各向异性来量化电子对称性破缺的实验框架，应用于手性过渡金属硅化物，建立了电子手性χ作为预测手性响应的描述符。
AI.motivation: 晶体结构对称性分类虽能预测物理性质，但响应大小由电子态的对称性破缺程度决定。目前仅少数情况（如电极化和磁化）有定量描述符，大多数类型（包括手性）缺乏类似描述符。
AI.method: 提出从价电子密度分布的各向异性量化电子对称性破缺的实验框架。在点对称约束下确定轨道杂化相位，应用于手性过渡金属硅化物，通过同步辐射X射线衍射观测价电子密度确定杂化相位。
AI.result: 从获得的复杂杂化中量化电子手性χ，理论证明χ与圆二色性成正比，建立了χ作为预测手性响应的描述符。该方法可系统应用于各种点群。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为量化电子对称性破缺和预测相关物理性质提供了通用途径，特别是建立了电子手性χ作为手性响应的定量预测描述符。

title: Geminal wavefunction models in chemistry
summary: Geminal wavefunctions, introduced in the late 1950s, have long been recognized for their ability to compactly capture strong electron correlation. Despite their promise, they were historically overshadowed by more computationally efficient methods. Advances in both computational resources and theoretical frameworks have renewed interest in geminal-based approaches, particularly as researchers seek accurate yet tractable wavefunctions for complex electronic systems. Recent developments highlight their versatility: from serving as efficient starting points for correlated wavefunctions, to hybrid formulations that blend geminal concepts with coupled-cluster theory, to emerging applications in quantum algorithms where orbital-pairing provides a natural structure. In this mini-review, we summarize key advances in geminal wavefunction theory, with a focus on their modern resurgence, new methodological innovations, and potential directions for electronic structure theory and quantum computation.

AI.tldr: 这篇迷你综述回顾了geminal波函数理论的关键进展，重点介绍了其现代复兴、新方法创新以及在电子结构理论和量子计算中的潜在方向。
AI.motivation: geminal波函数自1950年代末提出以来，因其能够紧凑地捕捉强电子相关性而备受关注。尽管有潜力，但历史上被更计算高效的方法所掩盖。随着计算资源和理论框架的进步，研究人员对geminal方法重新产生兴趣，特别是寻求复杂电子系统的准确且可处理的波函数。
AI.method: 综述总结了geminal波函数理论的关键进展，包括：作为相关波函数的高效起点、与耦合簇理论结合的混合公式、以及在量子算法中的应用，其中轨道配对提供了自然结构。
AI.result: geminal波函数展现出多功能性：从作为相关波函数的高效起点，到与耦合簇理论结合的混合公式，再到在量子算法中的新兴应用，其中轨道配对提供了自然结构。
AI.conclusion: geminal波函数理论正在经历现代复兴，新的方法创新为电子结构理论和量子计算提供了有前景的方向，特别是在处理强相关系统和量子算法开发方面具有潜力。

title: Hole concentrations in doped gray α-Sn on InSb and CdTe measured with infrared ellipsometry
summary: Gray tin (α-Sn) layers with 30 nm thickness were grown on InSb (001) substrates using molecular beam epitaxy. The surface preparation of the substrates was adjusted to achieve either n-type or p-type doping in the α-Sn layer. Fourier-transform infrared ellipsometry was used to find the temperature-dependent dielectric function of the α-Sn layers from 0.03 to 0.8 eV and from 10 to 300 K. Because of the inverted band structure of α-Sn, the spectra show a strong absorption peak at 0.45 eV due to transitions from the inverted {Γ_-^7} "electron" valence band to the {Γ_+^8} heavy hole valence band. Applying the Thomas-Reiche-Kuhn f-sum rule, the integrated oscillator strength of this peak was used to calculate the heavy hole concentration as a function of temperature. For a nearly intrinsic α-Sn layer, the heavy hole concentration agrees well with predictions based on degenerate Fermi-Dirac statistics. Deviations from the intrinsic α-Sn carrier concentrations are attributed to substrate surface preparation leading to the diffusion of donor or acceptor ions into the α-Sn layer causing n-type or p-type doping.

AI.tldr: 通过分子束外延在InSb衬底上生长30nm厚α-Sn薄膜，利用红外椭圆偏振光谱测量其温度依赖介电函数，观察到0.45eV处的强吸收峰源于倒带结构中的带间跃迁，通过f求和规则计算重空穴浓度并与理论预测对比。
AI.motivation: 研究α-Sn（灰锡）这种具有倒带结构的拓扑材料的电学和光学性质，探索其温度依赖的介电函数和载流子浓度特性，并了解衬底表面处理对掺杂类型的影响。
AI.method: 使用分子束外延在InSb(001)衬底上生长30nm厚α-Sn层；通过调整衬底表面处理实现n型和p型掺杂；采用傅里叶变换红外椭圆偏振光谱在0.03-0.8eV能量范围和10-300K温度范围内测量介电函数；应用Thomas-Reiche-Kuhn f求和规则从吸收峰积分振荡强度计算重空穴浓度。
AI.result: 光谱在0.45eV处观察到强吸收峰，源于倒带结构中Γ_-^7"电子"价带到Γ_+^8重空穴价带的跃迁；对于近本征α-Sn层，重空穴浓度与基于简并费米-狄拉克统计的预测吻合良好；偏离本征载流子浓度的现象归因于衬底表面处理导致的施主或受主离子扩散，分别引起n型或p型掺杂。
AI.conclusion: α-Sn的倒带结构导致独特的光学吸收特性，其载流子浓度可通过红外椭圆偏振光谱和f求和规则精确测定，衬底表面处理是控制α-Sn掺杂类型的关键因素，这为拓扑材料的电学性质调控提供了重要见解。

title: Ergodic properties of functionals of Gaussian processes
summary: We derive the first two moments of generic positive stochastic functionals in terms of the one- and two-time probability density functions of the underlying random walk, and we prove ergodicity of observables in stationary random walks. These general results are applied to the half-occupation time and the occupation time in an interval of a Gaussian random walk, for which we obtain exact analytic expressions for the first two moments. We then extend the analysis to scaled Brownian motion and fractional Brownian motion, computing the ergodicity breaking parameter and establishing a simple scaling form for the probability densities of occupation times. Within the framework of infinite ergodic theory, we further identify universal properties of positive observables. All analytical predictions are fully confirmed by numerical simulations.

AI.tldr: 论文推导了随机游走中正随机泛函的前两矩表达式，证明了平稳随机游走中观测量的遍历性，并将结果应用于高斯随机游走、标度布朗运动和分形布朗运动的占据时间分析。
AI.motivation: 研究随机游走中正随机泛函的统计特性，特别是占据时间等观测量的矩计算和遍历性问题，为理解复杂随机过程的统计行为提供理论框架。
AI.method: 通过随机游走的一时间和两时间概率密度函数推导正随机泛函的前两矩表达式，证明平稳随机游走的遍历性，并将理论应用于高斯随机游走、标度布朗运动和分形布朗运动的具体计算。
AI.result: 得到了正随机泛函前两矩的解析表达式，证明了平稳随机游走中观测量的遍历性，获得了高斯随机游走半占据时间和区间占据时间的前两矩精确解，计算了标度布朗运动和分形布朗运动的遍历破缺参数和占据时间概率密度的标度形式。
AI.conclusion: 建立了随机游走中正随机泛函统计特性的通用理论框架，揭示了占据时间等观测量的普遍性质，所有理论预测均得到数值模拟的完全验证，为无限遍历理论框架下的正观测量研究提供了基础。

title: Disambiguating electrical detection of magnetization dynamics in magnetic insulators
summary: Electrical detection of magnetization dynamics in magnetic insulators underpins both fundamental studies of magnon transport and the development of low-loss magnonic devices. In heavy-metal/magnetic-insulator heterostructures, spin pumping and spin-torque ferromagnetic resonance (ST-FMR) are widely used for this purpose and are often treated separately in different measurement geometries. In practice, the competition between these two effects gives rise to electrical voltage signals of opposite signs, which can lead to ambiguous interpretations of the underlying physics. Here, we show how to disambiguate their respective contributions and provide a framework for interpreting experiments involving microwave excitation of magnetic insulators and detection of magnetization dynamics via spin-charge conversion in heavy metals. We systematically investigate spin pumping and ST-FMR in nonlocal and local devices using Pt-capped thin films of thulium and bismuth-yttrium iron garnets. We show how spin-wave character, magnetic dissipation, magnetic field orientation and device geometry govern the sign and magnitude of the resulting signals. In several cases, the voltage generated by microwave excitation changes sign between an out-of-plane or in-plane magnetic configuration. We disentangle a contribution due to spin pumping, induced by exponentially decaying propagating spin waves, and a weakly distance-dependent contribution from ST-FMR, remotely induced by inductive coupling. We show that both the spin wave excitation profile across the film thickness and magnetic damping largely determine which of the two contributions dominates. Hence, the sign of the electrical signal cannot be uniquely assigned to the chirality of the magnon modes.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了区分磁性绝缘体中自旋泵浦和自旋力矩铁磁共振两种效应的框架，通过系统实验揭示了信号符号变化的物理机制，澄清了传统解释中的模糊性。
AI.motivation: 在重金属/磁性绝缘体异质结构中，自旋泵浦和自旋力矩铁磁共振通常在不同测量几何中被单独处理，但实际中这两种效应会产生符号相反的电压信号，导致对基础物理的模糊解释。
AI.method: 使用Pt覆盖的铥和铋钇铁石榴石薄膜，系统研究非局域和局域器件中的自旋泵浦和ST-FMR效应，分析自旋波特性、磁损耗、磁场方向和器件几何对信号符号和大小的影响。
AI.result: 发现微波激发产生的电压信号在面外和面内磁构型之间会改变符号，成功分离了由指数衰减传播自旋波引起的自旋泵浦贡献和由感应耦合远程诱导的弱距离依赖性ST-FMR贡献。
AI.conclusion: 自旋波激发剖面和磁阻尼主要决定哪种贡献占主导，因此电信号的符号不能唯一地归因于磁振子模式的手性，为解释涉及磁性绝缘体微波激发和重金属自旋-电荷转换的实验提供了清晰框架。

title: Ultrafast Current Switching from Quantum Geometry in Semimetals
summary: Technological progress towards next-generation electronics critically relies on achieving faster switching with reduced energy consumption. Because device operation speeds are fundamentally constrained by the intrinsic properties of constituent materials, identifying systems with inherently superior switching capabilities is essential. Here, we propose that semimetallic systems characterized by non-trivial quantum geometry, including quadratic band-touching semimetals and singular flat bands, can serve as a promising platform for ultrafast switching at voltages compatible with modern electronics. We show that, in such quantum geometric semimetals, an electric current is generated instantaneously upon application of a moderate external electric field, reaching its steady-state value. As a consequence, the current exhibits rapid and stable on-off switching behaviour under periodic optical pulse trains, demonstrating robustness under experimentally feasible conditions. In terms of switching speed, this quantum geometric semimetal outperforms conventional metals, semiconductors, and graphene. We identify the microscopic origin of this behaviour as interband coupling governed by the Hilbert-Schmidt quantum distance, together with a finite density of states at the band-touching point. This mechanism further leads to a universal classification of conductivity for both gapless and gapped quantum geometric semimetals. Finally, first-principles calculations suggest realistic material platforms, including bilayer graphene, cyclic graphene, monolayer bismuth and V3F8-in which the predicted instantaneous current switching can be directly realized, further supported by time-dependent density functional theory simulations performed for representative systems.

AI.tldr: 量子几何半金属可实现超快电流开关，在中等电场下瞬时产生电流，开关速度超越传统材料
AI.motivation: 下一代电子器件需要更快的开关速度和更低的能耗，但现有材料的固有特性限制了开关速度，因此需要寻找具有内在优越开关能力的系统
AI.method: 提出量子几何半金属（包括二次能带接触半金属和奇异平带）作为超快开关平台，通过希尔伯特-施密特量子距离描述带间耦合机制，并进行第一性原理计算和时变密度泛函理论模拟验证
AI.result: 量子几何半金属在中等电场下瞬时产生电流，在周期性光脉冲下表现出快速稳定的开关行为，开关速度优于传统金属、半导体和石墨烯，并提出了双层石墨烯、环状石墨烯、单层铋和V3F8等实际材料平台
AI.conclusion: 量子几何半金属是实现超快电子开关的有前景平台，其瞬时电流开关机制源于量子几何特性，为下一代低能耗高速电子器件提供了新方向

title: Spin-cavity interactions in relativistic Jahn-Teller systems under strong light-matter coupling
summary: We extend our recent work on the cavity-modified spin Zeeman effect of an effective spin-1/2-system[J. Chem. Phys. 163, 174307 (2025)] to a relativistic Jahn-Teller scenario under strong light-matter coupling. Here, the effective spin-1/2-system is realized via a single electron or a single hole in a doubly-degenerate molecular orbital system of trigonal symmetric transition metal complexes. Both single-particle and single-hole systems are subject to both vibronic and spin-orbit coupling (SOC) augmented by interactions with a quantized cavity field via the cavity Zeeman interaction. Methodologically, we combine the relativistic $E\times e$-Jahn-Teller model with a recently introduced effective Hamiltonian formalism based on quasi-degenerate perturbation theory, which treats the cavity-spin interaction in leading order beyond the dipole approximation. We derive analytic expressions for Kramers pair energies in weak and strong SOC regimes as well as related cavity-modified effective electronic g-factors. We find cavity-induced modifications of the electronic g-factor to become relevant in the weak SOC regime for both single-particle and single-hole systems while being effectively quenched under strong SOC. Alternating signs of the cavity-Zeeman correction render single-particle and single-hole scenarios distinct in their response to the cavity field from a g-factor perspective.

AI.tldr: 该研究将腔自旋塞曼效应扩展到相对论性Jahn-Teller场景，在强光-物质耦合下分析单电子和单空穴系统的腔修正有效g因子
AI.motivation: 扩展先前关于有效自旋-1/2系统腔修正塞曼效应的工作，研究在强光-物质耦合下，具有三角对称性的过渡金属配合物中相对论性Jahn-Teller系统的行为
AI.method: 结合相对论性E×e-Jahn-Teller模型与基于准简并微扰理论的有效哈密顿量形式，在偶极近似之外处理腔-自旋相互作用，推导弱和强自旋轨道耦合区域Kramers对能量的解析表达式
AI.result: 发现腔诱导的电子g因子修正：在弱自旋轨道耦合区域对单电子和单空穴系统都相关，但在强自旋轨道耦合下被有效淬灭；腔-塞曼修正的交替符号使得单电子和单空穴系统从g因子角度对腔场的响应不同
AI.conclusion: 腔场可以显著修改相对论性Jahn-Teller系统的有效g因子，特别是在弱自旋轨道耦合区域，且单电子和单空穴系统表现出不同的响应特性

title: Facet-dependent Chemical Kinetics Governed Growth of Twisted Graphene Layers with Pre-designed Angles
comment: 43 pages, 6 figures. Main text only, including Methods and References
summary: Twisted graphene layers (TGLs) provide a powerful platform for investigating multiple quantum phenomena, yet their scalable deployment is hindered by the lack of reliable synthesis with precise angle. Here, benefited from a deeper understanding of the interplay between grain index and graphene growth kinetics, we report a scalable strategy to grow TGLs with pre-designed twist angles on platinum (Pt) via chemical vapor deposition (CVD), Through a combination of complementary in situ methods, we identified the activity sequence of different Pt grains and attributed it to the area ratio of exposed (110) facets during graphene-induced surface reconstruction. Moreover, we revealed that CVD-grown graphene orientation is determined by the grain-orientation-dependent surface morphology. By leveraging the so-established correlations between grain index with both graphene growth priority and its orientation, we achieve controlled folding and tearing of graphene overlayer using a pair of adjacent grains with dramatically different catalytical activity and kink-free atomic steps. We reveal that overlayer-induced step bunching and terrace reconfiguration critically govern the domain morphology and folding direction. Building on this mechanistic insight, we demonstrate a substrate-engineering framework where specific platinum grains are rationally selected to yield TGLs with pre-designed twist angles, including magic angle with flat band dispersion. This work not only highlights fundamental kinetics of Pt catalyzed graphene CVD growth, but also offers a generalizable methodology for manipulating foldable two-dimensional materials via dynamic substrate reconstruction, exampled by programmable growth of high-quality TGLs on open surfaces.

AI.tldr: 通过理解铂晶粒指数与石墨烯生长动力学的关联，开发了在铂衬底上可控合成预设扭转角度的双层石墨烯的化学气相沉积方法，实现了包括魔角在内的可编程生长。
AI.motivation: 扭转石墨烯层是研究多种量子现象的重要平台，但缺乏可扩展、角度精确可控的合成方法限制了其应用。需要开发一种可靠的可控合成策略。
AI.method: 通过原位表征方法研究铂不同晶粒的催化活性序列，发现石墨烯诱导表面重构中(110)晶面暴露比例是关键。利用晶粒取向依赖的表面形貌控制石墨烯取向，通过相邻晶粒的催化活性差异实现可控折叠和撕裂，建立衬底工程框架。
AI.result: 实现了在铂衬底上可扩展生长预设扭转角度的双层石墨烯，包括具有平带色散的魔角结构。揭示了石墨烯覆盖层诱导的台阶束聚和平台重构对畴形态和折叠方向的调控机制。
AI.conclusion: 该工作不仅阐明了铂催化石墨烯CVD生长的基本动力学，还提供了一种通过动态衬底重构操纵可折叠二维材料的通用方法，为在开放表面上可编程生长高质量扭转石墨烯层奠定了基础。

title: Exact Steady State of a One-end Driven XXZ Spin Chain with Boundary Field
summary: We find an exact nonequilibrium steady state of an open dissipatively driven XXZ spin-1/2 chain with source or sink spin bath at one end and an arbitrary boundary field at the other end.

AI.tldr: 在开放耗散驱动的XXZ自旋-1/2链中，发现了一个精确的非平衡稳态解，该链在一端有源/汇自旋浴，另一端有任意边界场。
AI.motivation: 研究开放量子系统中非平衡稳态的性质，特别是具有不对称边界条件的XXZ自旋链，一端连接自旋浴（源或汇），另一端有任意边界场，这种设置具有理论和实验意义。
AI.method: 采用精确解析方法，在开放耗散驱动的XXZ自旋-1/2链模型中，考虑一端连接源或汇自旋浴，另一端施加任意边界场，求解非平衡稳态。
AI.result: 找到了该系统的精确非平衡稳态解，表明在这种不对称边界条件下存在可解析描述的稳态。
AI.conclusion: 成功解析了具有不对称边界条件的开放XXZ自旋链的非平衡稳态，为理解开放量子系统中的非平衡现象提供了精确解。

title: Hopping-Mediated Charge Transport in Graphene Beyond the Ballistic Regime
summary:
We present a trajectory-resolved framework for charge transport in graphene and related two-dimensional carbon systems beyond the ideal ballistic and fully coherent limits. Transport is described by kinetic Monte Carlo hopping on a predefined atomic lattice, allowing the combined treatment of disorder, thermal activation, and external fields. Current and effective transmittance are extracted directly from stochastic carrier trajectories, without phenomenological transport coefficients.
  We apply the method to graphene under bias voltage (0-0.10 V), temperature (300-900 K), magnetic field (0-10 T), in-plane strain (2-10%, uniaxial and biaxial), and vacancy concentration (0-10%). Pristine graphene shows an almost ohmic response, with currents of about 7-8 uA, effective transmittance near 0.98-1.00, and conductance of about (5.8-7.8) x 10^-5 S at 0.10 V, depending on direction. Vacancies strongly suppress transport, reducing transmittance to about 0.45-0.75 at 10% vacancy. Higher temperature accelerates hopping and partly restores transport, but cannot overcome severe connectivity loss. Magnetic fields further reduce transport, especially in disordered networks. The framework provides a unified computational scheme for realistic two-dimensional carbon materials and also yields diffusion coefficients and effective mobilities from carrier displacements and transit times.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于轨迹解析的框架，用于研究石墨烯等二维碳材料的电荷输运，超越了理想弹道和完全相干极限。通过动力学蒙特卡洛跳跃方法处理无序、热激活和外场，直接从随机载流子轨迹提取电流和有效透射率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常局限于理想弹道或完全相干输运，无法统一处理实际二维碳材料中的无序、热激活、外场等多种复杂因素，需要开发更全面的计算框架。
AI.method: 采用动力学蒙特卡洛跳跃方法，在预定义原子晶格上模拟电荷输运。该方法结合处理无序、热激活和外场，直接从随机载流子轨迹提取电流和有效透射率，无需唯象输运系数。
AI.result: 应用该框架研究了石墨烯在不同条件下的输运特性：偏压0-0.10V、温度300-900K、磁场0-10T、面内应变2-10%、空位浓度0-10%。原始石墨烯呈现近似欧姆响应，电流约7-8μA，有效透射率0.98-1.00，电导约(5.8-7.8)×10⁻⁵S。空位显著抑制输运，10%空位时透射率降至0.45-0.75。高温加速跳跃并部分恢复输运，但无法克服严重连接损失。磁场进一步降低输运，尤其在无序网络中。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为实际二维碳材料提供了统一的计算方案，能够从载流子位移和传输时间提取扩散系数和有效迁移率，超越了传统理想化模型，适用于复杂条件下的输运研究。

title: Antiferromagnetic Dimers in the Parent Phase of a Correlated Kagome Superconductor
summary: Kagome metals are prone to charge-density wave (CDW), magnetic, and superconducting phases, with their flat electronic band conducive for correlated physics. In contrast to the weakly correlated $A$V$_3$Sb$_5$ ($A$ = K, Rb, Cs) kagome metals with a $2\times2$ CDW, CsCr$_3$Sb$_5$ is a correlated metal with a flat band close to the Fermi level, and exhibits a $4\times1$ CDW intertwined with magnetic order. Under pressure, the intertwined orders are suppressed and give way to a dome of superconductivity that emerges from a non-Fermi liquid normal state. Here, we solve the crystal structure of the $4\times 1$ CDW state in CsCr$_3$Sb$_5$, and show it consists of Cr dimers separated by Cr chains. First-principles calculations show the dominant exchange interaction is antiferromagnetic within the dimers, while the intra-chain and dimer-chain couplings are much weaker. The CDW transition of CsCr$_3$Sb$_5$ is found to be more strongly first-order than those in $A$V$_3$Sb$_5$, without significant soft phonons or diffuse scattering above the CDW transition temperature. These findings suggest that fluctuating antiferromagnetic dimers may play a major role in the electron pairing of superconducting CsCr$_3$Sb$_5$.

AI.tldr: CsCr₃Sb₅是一种具有4×1电荷密度波(CDW)和磁序交织的强关联kagome金属，压力下这些有序态被抑制并出现超导穹顶，其CDW结构包含Cr二聚体和Cr链，二聚体内的反铁磁交换主导，可能对超导配对起重要作用。
AI.motivation: 研究CsCr₃Sb₅中4×1 CDW结构的晶体结构及其与磁序的关联，探索强关联kagome金属中CDW、磁序和超导之间的竞争关系，特别是理解压力诱导超导的机制。
AI.method: 通过实验解析CsCr₃Sb₅中4×1 CDW态的晶体结构，结合第一性原理计算分析交换相互作用，并与弱关联AV₃Sb₅体系进行对比研究。
AI.result: 发现CsCr₃Sb₅的4×1 CDW结构由Cr二聚体和Cr链组成，二聚体内的反铁磁交换相互作用占主导，而链内和二聚体-链之间的耦合较弱；CDW转变比AV₃Sb₅体系更强烈的一级相变，且在CDW转变温度以上没有显著的软声子或漫散射。
AI.conclusion: CsCr₃Sb₅中的CDW和磁序交织态在压力下被抑制后出现超导，表明涨落的反铁磁二聚体可能在CsCr₃Sb₅的超导电子配对中起重要作用。

title: Fully compensated and uncompensated ferrimagnetic ferrovalley semiconductors
summary: Altermagnets (AMs) and fully compensated ferrimagnets (FC-FIMs) are emerging classes of magnetic materials that combine the advantages of antiferromagnets and ferromagnets. Here, we elucidate the mechanism behind the uniaxial strain-driven transformation from AM to FC-FIM and find that the accompanying non-relativistic valley polarization is positively correlated with the net magnetic moment between magnetic atoms in opposite spin sublattices. We then propose an uncompensated ferrimagnetic monolayer VCrSeTeO to achieve large intrinsic valley polarization. Spin-orbit coupling (SOC) is shown to further increase the valley polarization to over 400 meV under uniaxial strains and the reason is explained in terms of SOC perturbation theorem. Furthermore, we reveal a distinctive anomalous valley Hall effect in which the valley Hall voltage is reversed within the same valley in ferrimagnet VCrSeTeO. This work proposes a strategy for realizing giant valley polarization and provides theoretical guidance for the application of ferrimagnetic ferrovalley semiconductors derived from altermagnets in valleytronics.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了从交变磁体到完全补偿铁磁体的应变驱动转变机制，提出了VCrSeTeO单层材料实现大本征谷极化，并揭示了独特的反常谷霍尔效应。
AI.motivation: 交变磁体和完全补偿铁磁体结合了反铁磁体和铁磁体的优势，但如何实现大谷极化并应用于谷电子学仍需要研究。
AI.method: 通过理论分析应变驱动转变机制，提出VCrSeTeO单层材料，利用自旋轨道耦合增强谷极化，并基于SOC微扰理论解释机制。
AI.result: 在单轴应变下，SOC可将谷极化提升至400 meV以上，并在铁磁体VCrSeTeO中发现了反常谷霍尔效应，谷霍尔电压在同一谷内反转。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提出了实现巨谷极化的策略，为从交变磁体衍生的铁磁铁谷半导体在谷电子学中的应用提供了理论指导。

authors: Maria Cristina Mariani Maria Pia Beccar-Varela
title: MF-toolkit: A High-Performance Python Library for Multifractal Analysis with Automated Crossover Detection, Source Identification and Application to Gravitational Waves Data
comment: This is the same manuscript available at SSRN: https://ssrn.com/abstract=6071889 or http://dx.doi.org/10.2139/ssrn.6071889
summary: Multifractal Detrended Fluctuation Analysis (MFDFA) is a powerful and widely used technique for characterizing the scaling properties and long-range correlations of complex time series. However, its application often involves significant practical challenges, such as the subjective identification of scaling regions (crossovers) and the disambiguation of the physical origins of multifractality. We introduce MF-toolkit, a high-performance, parallelized Python library designed to address these challenges. It integrates three key innovations: (1) fully automatic crossover detection algorithms (CDV-A and SPIC), which remove operator bias and enhance reproducibility; (2) a built-in implementation of the Iterative Amplitude Adjusted Fourier Transform (IAAFT) for generating surrogate data, enabling the robust identification of the source of multifractality; and (3) a comprehensive suite for generating synthetic time series for rigorous validation. We demonstrate the rigor and utility of MF-toolkit through its application to characterize the multifractal properties of non-stationary noise in gravitational wave (LIGO) data.
