The MF-toolkit library offers a robust, efficient, and user-friendly tool for advanced time series analysis, facilitating more rigorous and reproducible research across physics and other data-intensive fields.

AI.tldr: MF-toolkit：一个高性能Python库，用于解决MFDFA分析中的实际问题，包括自动交叉检测、多分形源识别和合成数据验证。
AI.motivation: MFDFA虽然强大，但在实际应用中存在挑战：主观识别缩放区域（交叉点）和难以区分多分形性的物理起源，需要更客观、可重复的工具。
AI.method: 开发MF-toolkit库，包含三个创新：1) 自动交叉检测算法（CDV-A和SPIC）；2) IAAFT替代数据生成用于多分形源识别；3) 合成时间序列生成套件用于验证。
AI.result: 成功应用于LIGO引力波数据的非平稳噪声多分形特性分析，证明该工具在物理等数据密集型领域的实用性和严谨性。
AI.conclusion: MF-toolkit提供了一个稳健、高效、用户友好的高级时间序列分析工具，促进了跨学科研究的严谨性和可重复性。

title: Benchmarking Current-to-Voltage Amplifiers for Quantum Transport Measurements
comment: Main text and Supplemental Material (18 pages, 21 figures)
summary: Accurate electrical amplification is essential in molecular electronics for measuring conductance through atomic and molecular junctions, where currents often span several orders of magnitude. In this work, we present a systematic design and comparative analysis of four current-to-voltage ($I\text{--}V$) amplifier architectures: single-stage linear, series-linear, logarithmic, and multi-stage cascaded, specifically optimized for break junction (BJ) techniques, including scanning tunneling microscopy (STM-BJ) and mechanically controllable break junctions (MCBJ). Each configuration is evaluated based on sensitivity, noise performance, and dynamic range. Our results characterize the trade-offs between circuit complexity and noise, providing a robust framework and practical guidelines for selecting amplification schemes in quantum transport experiments.

AI.tldr: 本文系统设计和比较了四种用于分子电子学中电导测量的电流-电压放大器架构，为断裂结技术提供优化方案和选择指南。
AI.motivation: 分子电子学中精确的电信号放大对于测量原子和分子结的电导至关重要，因为电流通常跨越多个数量级。断裂结技术（如STM-BJ和MCBJ）需要专门优化的放大器来应对宽动态范围的测量挑战。
AI.method: 系统设计和比较分析四种电流-电压放大器架构：单级线性、串联线性、对数式和多级级联放大器，特别针对断裂结技术进行优化。评估基于灵敏度、噪声性能和动态范围等关键指标。
AI.result: 研究结果量化了不同放大器配置在灵敏度、噪声和动态范围方面的性能差异，揭示了电路复杂性与噪声之间的权衡关系，为量子输运实验提供了实用的选择框架。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为分子电子学中的电导测量提供了系统化的放大器设计框架和选择指南，帮助研究人员根据具体实验需求在电路复杂性和噪声性能之间做出最佳权衡。

title: Extension of the iterated perturbation theory at arbitrary fillings to nonequilibrium steady states
summary: We extend the Kajueter-Kotliar [Phys. Rev. Lett. 77, 131 (1996)] iterated perturbation theory (KK-IPT) away from half filling to nonequilibrium steady states. We benchmark the resulting nonequilibrium KK-IPT approach against the auxiliary master equation approach (AMEA), whose accuracy is controlled in and out of equilibrium. As expected, in equilibrium, KK-IPT reproduces the AMEA results for different fillings with high accuracy at the level of both spectral properties and electron densities. Out of equilibrium, we study quantum transport across a correlated impurity and compute the differential conductance and spectral functions. We find very good agreement between nonequilibrium KK-IPT and AMEA in the parameter regime where the latter is reliable, in particular at moderate temperatures and biases. These results support nonequilibrium KK-IPT as an approximate description of nonequilibrium steady states away from half filling. Although a controlled benchmark is not available in the low-temperature, low-bias regime, where AMEA becomes less reliable, nonequilibrium KK-IPT remains numerically stable in those regions, suggesting that it may provide a useful alternative for nonequilibrium calculations in this regime.

AI.tldr: 将Kajueter-Kotliar迭代微扰理论扩展到非平衡稳态，并验证其准确性
AI.motivation: 需要一种能够处理非平衡稳态下远离半填充情况的可靠计算方法
AI.method: 扩展KK-IPT到非平衡稳态，并与辅助主方程方法进行基准测试
AI.result: 在中等温度和偏压下，非平衡KK-IPT与AMEA结果高度一致；在低温低偏压区域保持数值稳定
AI.conclusion: 非平衡KK-IPT为远离半填充的非平衡稳态计算提供了有用的近似方法

title: ChemGraph-XANES: An Agentic Framework for XANES Simulation and Analysis
summary: Computational X-ray absorption near-edge structure (XANES) is widely used to probe local coordination environments, oxidation states, and electronic structure in chemically complex systems. However, the use of computational XANES at scale is constrained more by workflow complexity than by the underlying simulation method itself. To address this challenge, we present ChemGraph-XANES, an agentic framework for automated XANES simulation and analysis that unifies natural-language task specification, structure acquisition, FDMNES input generation, task-parallel execution, spectral normalization, and provenance-aware data curation. Built on ASE, FDMNES, Parsl, and a LangGraph/LangChain-based tool interface, the framework exposes XANES workflow operations as typed Python tools that can be orchestrated by large language model (LLM) agents. In multi-agent mode, a retrieval-augmented expert agent consults the FDMNES manual to ground parameter selection, while executor agents translate user requests into structured tool calls. We demonstrate documentation-grounded parameter retrieval and show that the same workflow supports both explicit structure-file inputs and chemistry-level natural-language requests. Because independent XANES calculations are naturally task-parallel, the framework is well suited for high-throughput deployment on high-performance computing (HPC) systems, enabling scalable XANES database generation for downstream analysis and machine-learning applications. ChemGraph-XANES thus provides a reproducible and extensible workflow layer for physics-based XANES simulation, spectral curation, and agent-compatible computational spectroscopy.

AI.tldr: ChemGraph-XANES：基于智能代理的自动化XANES模拟框架，通过自然语言接口简化复杂计算流程
AI.motivation: 计算XANES光谱在复杂化学系统中应用广泛，但现有工作流程复杂限制了其规模化应用，需要简化操作流程
AI.method: 开发基于ASE、FDMNES、Parsl和LangGraph/LangChain的代理框架，将XANES工作流程操作封装为类型化Python工具，通过LLM代理编排，支持多代理协作和文档增强的参数检索
AI.result: 实现了文档驱动的参数检索，支持从结构文件输入到化学级自然语言请求的统一工作流程，适合高性能计算系统的任务并行部署
AI.conclusion: ChemGraph-XANES为基于物理的XANES模拟、光谱管理和代理兼容的计算光谱学提供了可重现、可扩展的工作流程层

title: Flat-band energy filtering in interacting systems: conditions for improving thermoelectric performances
summary: Motivated by recent theoretical and experimental studies on the role of flatbands in the thermoelectric properties of Ni$_3$In$_{1-x}$Sn$_x$ compounds, we investigate electron transport in two minimal one-dimensional flatband models, the sawtooth and diamond chains, which differ in a crucial aspect: the flatband is separated from the dispersive band by a finite gap in the former, while the two bands touch in the latter. Using a non-equilibrium Green function framework with interactions treated at the Hartree-Fock and GW levels, we compute the full set of thermoelectric coefficients and the figure of merit $zT$ as functions of gate voltage and temperature. We show that, contrary to naive expectation, a perfectly isolated flat-band is a physically ill-founded thermoelectric: the electrical conductivity vanishes as the chemical potential enters the flat-band, rendering the large Seebeck coefficient and the apparent violation of the Wiedemann-Franz law physically meaningless. Optimal thermoelectric performance is instead achieved just below the flat-band edge, where the transmission function varies most rapidly with energy, consistent with the Mahan-Sofo picture, and requires a finite broadening of the flat-band through hybridization with dispersive states. We further show that electron-electron interactions renormalize the flat-band structure itself, inducing an interaction-driven narrowing of the bandwidth and, in the diamond chain, a correlation-induced opening of a gap between the flat-band and the dispersive band near half-filling. Mean-field treatments are found to systematically overestimate \(zT\), highlighting the importance of beyond-mean-field correlations for quantitatively reliable predictions in flat-band thermoelectrics.

AI.tldr: 平带热电性能研究：完美孤立的平带热电性能差，最佳性能出现在平带边缘下方，需要与色散态杂化产生有限展宽；电子相互作用会重整化平带结构，平均场处理会高估zT。
AI.motivation: 受Ni3In1-xSnx化合物中平带在热电性能中作用的近期理论和实验研究启发，研究两种一维平带模型（锯齿链和钻石链）中的电子输运，探讨平带热电性能的物理机制。
AI.method: 使用非平衡格林函数框架，在Hartree-Fock和GW水平处理相互作用，计算完整的热电系数和品质因数zT随栅压和温度的变化；比较锯齿链（平带与色散带分离）和钻石链（两带接触）两种模型。
AI.result: 完美孤立的平带是物理上不合理的热电体：当化学势进入平带时电导率消失，大的塞贝克系数和明显的违反Wiedemann-Franz定律变得物理无意义；最佳热电性能出现在平带边缘下方，传输函数随能量变化最快处；电子-电子相互作用会重整化平带结构，在钻石链中诱导相关驱动的平带与色散带间能隙打开。
AI.conclusion: 平带热电性能需要与色散态杂化产生有限展宽，最佳性能出现在平带边缘下方；电子相互作用对平带结构有重要重整化效应；平均场处理会系统性地高估zT，超越平均场的关联对于平带热电材料的定量可靠预测至关重要。

title: Contribution of remote bands to orbital magnetization in twisted bilayer graphene
summary: Motivated by recent theoretical and experimental works on orbital magnetization $M_{\mathrm{orb}}$ for the interacting system, we develop a gauge-invariant framework to compute $M_{\mathrm{orb}}$ for correlated phases of magic-angle twisted bilayer graphene within self-consistent Hartree-Fock approximation. Based on the projector formulation of the theory of orbital magnetization, we evaluate both $M_{\mathrm{orb}}$ and the self-rotation contribution $m_{\mathrm{SR}}$ directly from the Hartree-Fock Hamiltonian. We demonstrate that, in contrast to topological invariants such as the Chern number, both $M_{\mathrm{orb}}$ and $m_{\mathrm{SR}}$ obtain substantial contributions from remote bands and thus require careful convergence with respect to the number of included remote bands. Applying this approach to correlated phases at integer fillings, we obtain converged $M_{\mathrm{orb}}$ and $m_{\mathrm{SR}}$ for time reversal symmetry broken Chern insulating states at $ν=\pm3$ and for competing correlated phases at other integer fillings. Our results establish a systematic and controlled approach for evaluating orbital magnetization in correlated moiré systems and clarify the crucial role of remote bands in determining their magnetic response.

AI.tldr: 开发了一种规范不变框架，用于计算魔角扭曲双层石墨烯中相关相的轨道磁化强度，考虑了远程能带的贡献。
AI.motivation: 受最近关于相互作用系统轨道磁化强度的理论和实验研究启发，需要开发一种能够处理魔角扭曲双层石墨烯中相关相的轨道磁化计算方法。
AI.method: 基于轨道磁化理论的投影子表述，开发了规范不变框架，在自洽Hartree-Fock近似下直接计算轨道磁化强度和自旋转贡献，特别关注远程能带的收敛性。
AI.result: 获得了整数填充下相关相的收敛轨道磁化强度和自旋转贡献，包括ν=±3时的陈绝缘态，并证明了远程能带对磁响应的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 建立了一种系统且可控的方法来评估相关莫尔系统中的轨道磁化，阐明了远程能带在决定其磁响应中的关键作用。

title: Spinon shift current in a noncentrosymmetric quantum spin chain
summary: We theoretically study direct current generation in a quantum spin chain induced by spinon excitations by light irradiation. We consider a s=1/2 1D antiferromagnetic XXZ model with magnetoelectric coupling that describes multiferroics with broken inversion symmetry. We perform the real-time simulation using infinite time-evolving block decimation (iTEBD), and demonstrate the direct current generation under light irradiation. By comparing the second order nonlinear conductivity and the two-spinon excitation spectra of 1D XXZ model, we confirm that the spinon excitations are the origin for the direct current generation in the quantum spin chain. We find that the bulk photovoltaic effect is driven by electric polarization carried by the spinons through the shift current mechanism, and thus is regarded as ``the spinon shift current''.

AI.tldr: 该研究从理论上探讨了光照射下量子自旋链中由自旋子激发诱导的直流电流生成，提出了"自旋子位移电流"的概念。
AI.motivation: 研究量子自旋链中光诱导直流电流生成的物理机制，特别是探索自旋子激发在光伏效应中的作用。
AI.method: 采用s=1/2一维反铁磁XXZ模型描述破坏反演对称性的多铁性材料，使用无限时间演化块解耦(iTEBD)方法进行实时模拟。
AI.result: 通过比较二阶非线性电导率和二维自旋子激发谱，确认自旋子激发是量子自旋链中直流电流生成的来源，发现体光伏效应通过位移电流机制由自旋子携带的电极化驱动。
AI.conclusion: 量子自旋链中的直流电流生成源于自旋子激发，这种通过位移电流机制由自旋子携带电极化驱动的体光伏效应可称为"自旋子位移电流"。

title: Direct Orientation Contrast Imaging of Anti-Phase Domains on III-V Materials Using Scanning Electron Microscopy
summary: Direct orientation contrast imaging of zinc-blende III-V materials is studied using scanning electron microscopy. A quantitative approach is taken using a 3 μm thick orientation-patterned GaP grown on GaAs sample, studying the anti-phase domain contrast with respect to the electron beam energy and the tilt angle. A qualitative approach is taken for III-V grown on non-polar materials with and without chemical mechanical polishing. Finally, a processing of the acquired image for GaP on Si reveals in plane preferential anti-phase boundaries.

AI.tldr: 利用扫描电子显微镜研究闪锌矿III-V族材料的直接取向对比成像，通过定量和定性方法分析反相畴对比度与电子束能量、倾斜角度的关系，并揭示GaP/Si中的面内优先反相边界
AI.motivation: 研究闪锌矿III-V族材料在扫描电子显微镜下的取向对比成像特性，特别是反相畴的对比度机制，这对于材料表征和质量控制具有重要意义
AI.method: 采用定量方法：使用3μm厚取向图案化GaP/GaAs样品，研究反相畴对比度与电子束能量和倾斜角度的关系；定性方法：研究III-V族材料在非极性衬底上的生长（有/无化学机械抛光）；图像处理：分析GaP/Si样品的反相边界特征
AI.result: 建立了反相畴对比度与电子束参数的关系，揭示了GaP/Si样品中存在面内优先反相边界，为材料缺陷表征提供了有效方法
AI.conclusion: 扫描电子显微镜能够有效表征闪锌矿III-V族材料的取向对比和反相畴结构，为材料生长质量评估和缺陷分析提供了重要工具

title: Experimentally-validated multi-slice simulation of electron diffraction patterns
summary: High-Resolution Electron Backscatter Diffraction (HR-EBSD) has advanced rapidly in recent years, significantly improving elastic strain measurements and dislocation density evaluation with submicron spatial resolution. To achieve better accuracy in the measurements, high-quality dynamical simulation patterns are required to be matched with experimental ones. Currently, the most widely used pattern simulation method, the Bloch Wave method (BW), can accurately predict the positions and brightness of Kikuchi poles and bands, but is intrinsically limited to perfect crystal structures. Another simulation scheme, the multi-slice method (MS), follows the evolution of electron waves as they travel through the sample. MS is advantageous in simulating various defect structures with more diffraction details.  Yet, it is mainly considered for theoretical developments and has not been compared to experimental data.  This paper optimizes the MS method by abandoning the high-energy hypothesis and utilizing higher-order Taylor expansions to approach the forward-only Schrodinger equation. Experimental EBSD patterns of polycrystal Al-Mg alloys are used to challenge MS simulations as a reference for indexation.  It is demonstrated that the 5th-order expansion of MS, referred to as MS5, achieves a good balance between computational cost and pattern precision. A tailored isotropic distortion correction model and standard stereographic triangle reconstruction enhance the precision of MS5 to be comparable with BW. To the best of our knowledge, this study provides the first comparison of MS EBSD simulations with experimental data. It opens new possibilities for EBSD characterization, such as reproducing diffraction patterns of crystals with various defects.

AI.tldr: 优化多切片方法用于EBSD模拟，通过高阶泰勒展开和实验验证，使MS5在计算成本与精度间取得平衡，达到与Bloch Wave方法相当的精度。
AI.motivation: 目前广泛使用的Bloch Wave方法仅限于完美晶体结构，而多切片方法能模拟各种缺陷结构但未与实验数据比较。需要开发能准确模拟缺陷晶体EBSD图案的方法。
AI.method: 优化多切片方法，放弃高能假设，采用高阶泰勒展开逼近正向Schrödinger方程。使用5阶展开的MS5方法，结合各向同性畸变校正模型和标准立体三角形重建。
AI.result: MS5在计算成本和图案精度间取得良好平衡，精度可与Bloch Wave方法相媲美。首次将多切片EBSD模拟与实验数据（Al-Mg合金）进行比较验证。
AI.conclusion: 研究首次将多切片EBSD模拟与实验数据对比，为EBSD表征开辟新可能性，如再现含各种缺陷晶体的衍射图案。

title: Identification and Structural Characterization of Twisted Atomically Thin Bilayer Materials by Deep Learning
summary: Two-dimensional materials are expected to play an important role in next-generation electronics and optoelectronic devices. Recently, twisted bilayer graphene and transition metal dichalcogenides have attracted significant attention due to their unique physical properties and potential applications. In this study we describe the use of optical microscopy to collect the color space of chemical vapor deposition (CVD) molybdenum disulfide ($\mbox{MoS}_2$), and the application of a semantic segmentation convolutional neural network (CNN) to accurately and rapidly identify thicknesses of $\mbox{MoS}_2$ flakes. A second CNN model is trained to provide precise predictions on the twist angle of CVD-grown bilayer flakes. This model harnessed a dataset comprising over 10,000 synthetic images, encompassing geometries spanning from hexagonal to triangular shapes. Subsequent validation of the deep learning predictions on twist angles was executed through the second harmonic generation and Raman spectroscopy. Our results introduce a scalable methodology for automated inspection of twisted atomically thin CVD-grown bilayer.

AI.tldr: 使用光学显微镜和卷积神经网络自动识别CVD生长的MoS₂薄片厚度和扭转角度
AI.motivation: 二维材料在下一代电子和光电器件中具有重要应用前景，特别是扭转双层石墨烯和过渡金属硫族化合物因其独特的物理性质备受关注。需要开发快速、准确的自动化方法来表征这些材料的厚度和扭转角度。
AI.method: 1. 使用光学显微镜采集CVD生长的MoS₂薄片的颜色空间信息；2. 训练语义分割CNN模型识别MoS₂薄片厚度；3. 训练第二个CNN模型预测双层薄片的扭转角度，使用包含10,000多张合成图像的数据集（涵盖六边形到三角形几何形状）；4. 通过二次谐波产生和拉曼光谱验证深度学习预测结果。
AI.result: 开发了一种可扩展的方法，能够自动检测CVD生长的原子级薄双层材料的厚度和扭转角度。CNN模型能够准确快速地识别厚度，并精确预测扭转角度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为自动化检测扭转原子级薄CVD生长双层材料提供了一种可扩展的解决方案，有望加速二维材料的研究和应用开发。

title: Mircomechanical insights into unconstrained grain boundary sliding
summary: Grain boundary sliding (GBS) is a key deformation mechanism at high homologous temperatures in polycrystalline materials, however, its intrinsic behavior is often obscured by additional strain accommodation processes. In this study, dislocation-mediated unconstrained GBS was investigated using Ni bicrystal micropillars containing a single high-angle grain boundary. Micropillar compression tests were conducted over a temperature range from room temperature to $600\,^{\circ}\mathrm{C}$ and strain rates between $5\times10^{-4}$ and $10^{-1}\,\mathrm{s}^{-1}$. By comparing bicrystal and single-crystal responses, the intrinsic contribution of GBS was isolated. The strain-rate sensitivity remained low (SRS $\approx 0.034 \pm 0.017$), comparable to room temperature values, indicating the absence of diffusion-controlled accommodation mechanisms. The activation energy for GBS was determined to be $234\,\mathrm{kJ\,mol^{-1}}$, consistent with grain boundary diffusion-assisted glide of grain boundary dislocations. These results demonstrate that the high strain-rate sensitivity commonly associated with GBS in polycrystals originates primarily from accommodation processes rather than the intrinsic sliding mechanism.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了镍双晶微柱中位错介导的无约束晶界滑移，通过对比双晶和单晶响应，分离出晶界滑移的本征贡献，发现其应变速率敏感性较低，表明多晶中常见的高应变速率敏感性主要源于协调过程而非本征滑移机制。
AI.motivation: 晶界滑移是高温下多晶材料的关键变形机制，但其本征行为常被额外的应变协调过程所掩盖。本研究旨在分离晶界滑移的本征贡献，探究其内在机制。
AI.method: 使用含单个大角度晶界的镍双晶微柱，在室温至600°C的温度范围和5×10⁻⁴至10⁻¹ s⁻¹的应变速率下进行微柱压缩试验，通过对比双晶和单晶响应来分离晶界滑移的本征贡献。
AI.result: 应变速率敏感性保持较低水平（SRS≈0.034±0.017），与室温值相当，表明不存在扩散控制的协调机制。晶界滑移的活化能为234 kJ·mol⁻¹，与晶界扩散辅助的晶界位错滑移一致。
AI.conclusion: 多晶中通常与晶界滑移相关的高应变速率敏感性主要源于协调过程，而非本征滑移机制本身。晶界滑移的本征行为由晶界扩散辅助的晶界位错滑移主导。

title: Formation of photoinduced space-charge field during in-bulk domain creation by femtosecond NIR laser irradiation in MgO:LN crystals
summary: We have studied the domain switching under NIR fs-laser irradiation in MgO:LN single crystals with special attention to the relative positions of the light-induced domains, microtracks and regions with modified refractive index in the vicinity of the focusing point. The optical imaging along X direction of the irradiated sample demonstrated the narrow microtracks and the lens-shaped regions ("lenses") located in the vicinity of the microtracks. The relative positions of light-induced microtracks, domains and lenses were revealed by overlapping of their images. We have found that the domain envelops the microtrack and partially intersects with the lens. The temperature stability of all light-induced objects during annealing was studied. It was shown that the local modification of the refractive index disappeared irreversibly while the microtrack and domain remain unchanged. The obtained local modification of the refractive index has been considered as a result of the photorefractive effect. The disappearance of the lens after annealing is caused by bulk screening of the photoinduced space-charge field by increased bulk conductivity. The generation of photovoltaic field by tightly focused NIR fs-laser irradiation close to the focusing point is reported for the first time to the authors' knowledge. It should be noted that in LN the photovoltaic field is codirectional with spontaneous polarization and thus cannot switch the polarization. However, it is possible in ferroelectrics with the opposite direction of the photovoltaic field and low value of threshold field. The revealed effect can be utilized for creation of 3D nonlinear photonic crystals by in-bulk domain engineering.

AI.tldr: 研究近红外飞秒激光在MgO:LN晶体中诱导的微裂纹、畴和折射率变化区域的空间关系及热稳定性，首次报道了紧密聚焦激光在焦点附近产生光伏电场。
AI.motivation: 研究飞秒激光在铁电晶体中诱导的微结构形成机制，特别是微裂纹、畴和折射率变化区域之间的空间关系，探索其在三维非线性光子晶体制造中的应用潜力。
AI.method: 使用近红外飞秒激光照射MgO:LN单晶，通过X方向光学成像观察微裂纹和透镜状区域，通过图像重叠分析微裂纹、畴和透镜的相对位置，研究退火过程中的热稳定性。
AI.result: 发现畴包裹微裂纹并与透镜部分相交；折射率变化在退火后不可逆消失，而微裂纹和畴保持不变；首次报道了紧密聚焦激光在焦点附近产生光伏电场。
AI.conclusion: 折射率变化由光折变效应引起，退火后消失是由于体电导率增加屏蔽了光诱导空间电荷场；该效应可用于通过体畴工程制造三维非线性光子晶体。

title: Laser-written reconfigurable energy landscapes and programmable Moiré spin textures
summary: Magnetic textures are central to emerging spintronic and unconventional computing technologies due to their rich dynamics, topological properties and nanoscale dimensions. A major challenge remains achieving tunable, reversible, and spatially resolved control over these textures and their evolution as a function of external stimuli, by spatially reprogramming the magnetic energy landscape that governs their nucleation and stability. Here, we exploit a focused laser-assisted local field cooling technique that establishes a fast, non-contact and scalable platform for grayscale spin texture engineering. By non-destructively controlling the exchange-bias anisotropy with nanoscale resolution in thin-film heterostructures, this approach enables grayscale, reprogrammable control of the local energy profile, which we use to create magnetic patterns with highly controlled hysteresis, field-dependent readability and tunable switching thresholds. Leveraging this capability, we demonstrate information encoding with magnetic field-gated readability, and artificial spin metamaterials, stabilizing spin lattices with field-reconfigurable symmetries and creating artificial Moiré spin textures via the geometric superposition of twisted magnetic potentials. These results establish a versatile, reprogrammable platform that bridges the gap between application-oriented magnetic memory and fundamental studies of emergent order in artificial lattices.

AI.tldr: 利用聚焦激光辅助局部场冷却技术，实现纳米级可编程磁性能量景观控制，用于灰度自旋纹理工程和信息编码
AI.motivation: 磁纹理在自旋电子学和非常规计算技术中具有重要应用，但实现可调谐、可逆且空间分辨的控制仍然是一个主要挑战。需要开发能够空间重编程磁性能量景观的方法来控制磁纹理的成核和稳定性。
AI.method: 采用聚焦激光辅助局部场冷却技术，通过非破坏性控制薄膜异质结构中的交换偏置各向异性，实现纳米级分辨率的灰度可编程局部能量分布控制。
AI.result: 实现了磁图案的高度可控磁滞、场依赖可读性和可调开关阈值；展示了具有磁场门控可读性的信息编码，以及人工自旋超材料，稳定了具有场可重构对称性的自旋晶格，并通过扭曲磁势的几何叠加创建了人工莫尔自旋纹理。
AI.conclusion: 建立了一个多功能、可重编程的平台，弥合了面向应用的磁存储器与人工晶格中涌现序的基础研究之间的差距。

title: Bridging Atomistic and Continuum Descriptions of Nanoscale Dislocation Loops in Tungsten
summary: In order to predict the long-term effects of irradiation on the material properties of tungsten, a continuum approach to simulating the interactions of dislocation loops, which arise from radiation damage, is proposed. Continuum models of the displacement, strain and stress fields produced by dislocation loops exhibit unphysical singularities near the defect core, but are thought to accurately capture atomistic displacements in the far-field. A linear elastic model of nanoscale dislocation loops in tungsten is developed, and the model is verified using atomistic simulations to ensure that the model is informed by lower-length scale phenomena such that the physics of the problem is correctly captured. We discuss the model and its advantages, and show that predictions produced by atomistic simulations do indeed agree well with the far-field behaviour of the continuum model when dislocation loops are far from material boundaries. In particular, we robustly demonstrate that the decay rate of atomistic results and continuum results coincide with one another, and show that the results converge as the size of the atomistic simulations approach the far-field limit.

AI.tldr: 提出一种连续介质方法来模拟钨中辐照产生的位错环，通过线性弹性模型描述纳米级位错环，并用原子模拟验证远场行为的一致性。
AI.motivation: 为了预测辐照对钨材料性能的长期影响，需要模拟辐射损伤产生的位错环相互作用。连续介质模型在缺陷核附近存在非物理奇点，但被认为能准确捕捉远场的原子位移。
AI.method: 开发了钨中纳米级位错环的线性弹性模型，并使用原子模拟进行验证，确保模型能正确捕捉低尺度物理现象。特别关注位错环远离材料边界时的远场行为。
AI.result: 原子模拟预测与连续介质模型的远场行为吻合良好。原子结果与连续介质结果的衰减率一致，且随着原子模拟尺寸接近远场极限，结果会收敛。
AI.conclusion: 该连续介质方法能有效模拟钨中辐照产生的位错环相互作用，特别是在远场区域，为预测辐照对材料性能的长期影响提供了可靠工具。

title: Atomistic Mechanisms of Stress-Dependent Molten Salt Corrosion in NiCr Alloys
summary: Ni-based structural alloys in molten salt environments often experience simultaneous mechanical loading and corrosive attack, yet the mechanisms governing stress-corrosion interactions remain unclear. Prior studies largely emphasize tensile stress, while the role of compressive stress has received limited attention. Here, reactive molecular dynamics simulations are used to investigate the coupled effects of applied strain and corrosion in Ni$_{0.75}$Cr$_{0.25}$ exposed to molten FLiNaK at 800$^\circ$C. A $\Sigma5(210)$ grain boundary model is subjected to tensile (+4%) to compressive (-4%) uniaxial strains, and corrosion behavior is evaluated through fluorine adsorption, charge redistribution, and grain boundary evolution. Tensile strain accelerates intergranular corrosion by reducing local atomic packing through elastic dilation and increasing excess free volume at the grain boundary, which enhances atomic mobility and salt infiltration. In contrast, compressive strain suppresses corrosion by promoting the formation of a ridge-like surface layer along the grain boundary, limiting salt access to the underlying alloy. These results provide atomistic insight into how stress states influence grain boundary corrosion in molten salts.

AI.tldr: 通过反应分子动力学模拟研究Ni₀.₇₅Cr₀.₂₅合金在熔融FLiNaK盐中应力状态对晶界腐蚀的影响机制
AI.motivation: 镍基结构合金在熔盐环境中常同时承受机械载荷和腐蚀侵蚀，但应力-腐蚀相互作用机制尚不明确。先前研究主要关注拉应力，而压应力的作用研究有限。
AI.method: 采用反应分子动力学模拟，研究Ni₀.₇₅Cr₀.₂₅合金在800°C熔融FLiNaK盐中的腐蚀行为。对Σ5(210)晶界模型施加从拉伸(+4%)到压缩(-4%)的单轴应变，通过氟吸附、电荷重分布和晶界演化评估腐蚀行为。
AI.result: 拉伸应变通过弹性膨胀降低局部原子堆积密度，增加晶界过剩自由体积，从而增强原子迁移率和盐渗透，加速晶间腐蚀。压缩应变则通过促进沿晶界形成脊状表面层，限制盐对底层合金的接触，从而抑制腐蚀。
AI.conclusion: 研究从原子尺度揭示了应力状态如何影响熔盐环境中的晶界腐蚀，为理解应力-腐蚀相互作用提供了重要机制见解。
